latestResearchKo.title: Metabolite Identification for Anti-Doping Detection of Ibutamoren
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Comprehensive analysis of MK-677 metabolites in human urine using LC-HRMS, identifying key markers for anti-doping enforcement and establishing detection windows for regulatory compliance.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 이부타모렌의 반도핑 검출을 위한 대사산물 식별
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: LC-HRMS를 사용하여 인간 소변 내 MK-677 대사산물을 종합적으로 분석하고, 도핑 방지 시행을 위한 주요 마커를 식별하고 규제 준수를 위한 탐지 창을 설정합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Structural Basis of Ghrelin Receptor Activation by Ibutamoren
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Molecular mechanism study revealing how MK-677 selectively activates ghrelin receptors, providing insights into its specificity and explaining therapeutic effects through structural biology approaches.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: Ibutamoren에 의한 그렐린 수용체 활성화의 구조적 기초
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: MK-677이 어떻게 그렐린 수용체를 선택적으로 활성화하는지 밝히는 분자 메커니즘 연구로, 그 특이성에 대한 통찰력을 제공하고 구조 생물학 접근법을 통해 치료 효과를 설명합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: FDA Warning: Beyond the Hype - Potential Health Risks of MK-677
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Official FDA communication highlighting significant safety risks including congestive heart failure potential, regulatory status as unapproved investigational drug, and prohibition in dietary supplements.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: FDA 경고: 과대광고를 넘어서 - MK-677의 잠재적인 건강 위험
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 울혈성 심부전 가능성, 승인되지 않은 연구 약물로서의 규제 상태, 식이 보조제 금지 등 심각한 안전 위험을 강조하는 공식 FDA 커뮤니케이션입니다.

tissueRepair.title: Muscle Preservation
tissueRepair.description: Reverses diet-induced catabolism with +2.69g/day nitrogen retention vs -8.97g/day placebo, supporting muscle preservation during caloric restriction.

tissueRepair.title: Body Composition
tissueRepair.description: Increases fat-free mass by 1.1-2.7kg over 8-12 months with preferential lean tissue accrual and 15% basal metabolic rate increase within 2 weeks.

tissueRepair.title: Bone Health
tissueRepair.description: 39-45% increase in bone formation markers including osteocalcin within 6-8 weeks, supporting bone turnover and potential fracture prevention.

antiAging.title: Growth Hormone Restoration
antiAging.description: Restores youthful GH/IGF-1 levels in elderly subjects with 97% increased pulsatile secretion, addressing age-related somatopause without suppressing natural production.

antiAging.title: Sleep Quality Enhancement
antiAging.description: 20% REM increase in young subjects, 50% improvement in elderly adults, contributing to recovery and natural growth hormone optimization during sleep.

antiAging.title: Metabolic Benefits
antiAging.description: Sustained 40-72% IGF-1 elevation maintained over 12-24 months supporting metabolic function, though requires monitoring for glucose effects.

energyMetabolism.title: Energy Expenditure
energyMetabolism.description: 15% basal metabolic rate increase documented at 2 weeks, contributing to enhanced energy utilization and metabolic function.

energyMetabolism.title: Recovery Enhancement
energyMetabolism.description: Improved recovery through sustained growth factor elevation and enhanced sleep quality, supporting training adaptation and tissue repair.

energyMetabolism.title: Appetite Regulation
energyMetabolism.description: Ghrelin receptor activation increases appetite in >50% of users - can be beneficial for muscle building but may complicate fat loss goals.

mots-c.routeDetail: InjectableSubcutaneous: abdomen, thigh, upper arm (rotate sites)
mots-c.descriptionEn: MOTS-c is a 16-amino acid mitochondrial-derived peptide encoded by the mitochondrial genome. It acts as a mitohormone that regulates metabolic homeostasis, enhances insulin sensitivity, and promotes longevity. MOTS-c operates through the Folate-AICAR-AMPK pathway and can translocate to the nucleus under metabolic stress to regulate gene expression.
mots-c.keyBenefits: Enhanced insulin sensitivity, improved glucose metabolism, activation of AMPK pathway, mitochondrial function optimization, exercise performance enhancement, and potential longevity benefits.
mots-c.mechanism: MOTS-c operates through the Folate-AICAR-AMPK pathway, inhibiting the folate cycle and leading to AMPK activation. Under metabolic stress, it translocates to the nucleus and binds to stress-response transcription factors (NRF2, ATF1/ATF7) to regulate gene expression involved in metabolism, antioxidant response, and cellular stress adaptation.Molecular InformationWeight2,174.6 DaLength16 amino acid
mots-c.protocolTiming: Optimal timing is morning before exercise. Exercise enhances endogenous MOTS-c production by 11.9-fold in muscle tissue. AMPK activation occurs within 30 minutes of administration.Peptide InteractionsMetforminUse CautionNAD+ PrecursorsSynergisticGrowth Hormone PeptidesCompatibleBerberineMonitor Comb

metabolic.title: Insulin Resistance
metabolic.description: Improves insulin sensitivity by ~30% in animal studies through AMPK activation. Enhances glucose uptake in skeletal muscle and improves glucose tolerance.

metabolic.title: Type 2 Diabetes
metabolic.description: Clinical trials show improved glucose homeostasis. Restores metabolic function through enhanced insulin receptor sensitization and AMPK-mediated metabolic regulation.

metabolic.title: Obesity Prevention
metabolic.description: Prevents obesity despite identical caloric intake in animal models. Promotes fatty acid oxidation and thermogenesis through mitochondrial activation.

metabolic.title: No Oral Research Available
metabolic.description: MOTS-c is a 16-amino acid peptide likely degraded by gastric acid and digestive enzymes. No oral bioavailability studies exist.

antiAging.title: Physical Performance
antiAging.description: Reverses age-dependent physical decline in animal studies. Improved grip strength, gait parameters, and exercise capacity in aged mice.

antiAging.title: Mitochondrial Function
antiAging.description: Enhances mitochondrial biogenesis through PGC-1α activation. Improves mitochondrial respiratory capacity and energy production.

antiAging.title: Longevity
antiAging.description: Late-life treatment showed 6.4% median lifespan extension in mice. Age-related decline of 21% in elderly humans suggests therapeutic potential.

exercise.title: Exercise Capacity
exercise.description: Single dose improved running time by 12% and distance by 15% in mice. Exercise induces 11.9-fold increase in skeletal muscle MOTS-c.

exercise.title: Muscle Homeostasis
exercise.description: Supports muscle health through myostatin reduction and anti-atrophy effects. Positively correlated with muscle strength and power in humans.

exercise.title: Recovery
exercise.description: Promotes mitochondrial biogenesis and reduces inflammatory markers. Enhances metabolic flexibility for improved recovery.

latestResearch.title: Therapeutic Potential in Age-Related Macular Degeneration
latestResearch.excerpt: MOTS-c exhibits dose-dependent protective effects in retinal pigment epithelial cells, reducing apoptosis and promoting mitochondrial biogenesis. Lower concentrations (500 nM) proved more effective than higher doses (5 µM). Shows potential therapeutic benefits in AMD by enhancing cellular metabolism.

latestResearch.title: Muscle Strength Correlation in Physically Active Individuals
latestResearch.excerpt: Serum MOTS-c concentration positively correlated with average power, force of jumps, muscle mass, and BMI in 20 physically active volunteers. MOTS-c may serve as a biomarker for muscle strength and power in humans, independent of aerobic capacity.

latestResearch.title: Comprehensive Review: Stress, Metabolism and Aging Mechanisms
latestResearch.excerpt: MOTS-c rapidly translocates into the nucleus within 30 min of metabolic stress, binding to NRF2 and ATF1/ATF7 transcription factors. Acts through Folate-AICAR-AMPK pathway to influence energy metabolism and insulin resistance. Age-related decline of 21% in 70-81 year-olds versus 18-30 year-olds.

latestResearch.title: MOTS-c in Human Aging and Age-Related Diseases
latestResearch.excerpt: Comprehensive review of MOTS-c's role in human aging, metabolic regulation, and therapeutic potential. Covers molecular mechanisms, nuclear translocation, AMPK signaling, and age-dependent decline in circulating levels with implications for longevity interventions.

mots-c.descriptionKo: MOTS-c는 미토콘드리아 게놈에 의해 암호화된 16개 아미노산의 미토콘드리아 유래 펩타이드입니다. 이는 대사 항상성을 조절하고, 인슐린 감수성을 향상시키며, 장수를 촉진하는 미토호르몬 역할을 합니다. MOTS-c는 Folate-AICAR-AMPK 경로를 통해 작동하며 대사 스트레스 하에서 핵으로 이동하여 유전자 발현을 조절할 수 있습니다.
mots-c.keyBenefitsKo: 향상된 인슐린 민감성, 향상된 포도당 대사, AMPK 경로 활성화, 미토콘드리아 기능 최적화, 운동 성능 향상 및 잠재적 장수 혜택.
mots-c.mechanismKo: MOTS-c는 Folate-AICAR-AMPK 경로를 통해 작동하여 엽산 주기를 억제하고 AMPK 활성화를 유도합니다. 대사 스트레스 하에서는 핵으로 이동하여 스트레스 반응 전사 인자(NRF2, ATF1/ATF7)에 결합하여 대사, 항산화 반응 및 세포 스트레스 적응에 관여하는 유전자 발현을 조절합니다. 분자 정보 무게2,174.6 DaLength16 아미노산
safetyNotesKo: 최소한의 부작용으로 동물 연구에서 일반적으로 내약성이 우수합니다.
당뇨병 약을 사용하는 경우 혈당을 모니터링하십시오. 복용량 조정이 필요할 수 있습니다.

재발성 저혈당증 에피소드(<50mg/dL)

latestResearchKo.title: Therapeutic Potential in Age-Related Macular Degeneration
latestResearchKo.excerpt: MOTS-c exhibits dose-dependent protective effects in retinal pigment epithelial cells, reducing apoptosis and promoting mitochondrial biogenesis. Lower concentrations (500 nM) proved more effective than higher doses (5 µM). Shows potential therapeutic benefits in AMD by enhancing cellular metabolism.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 연령 관련 황반변성의 치료 가능성
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: MOTS-c는 망막 색소 상피 세포에서 용량 의존적 보호 효과를 나타내며 세포 사멸을 감소시키고 미토콘드리아 생물 발생을 촉진합니다. 낮은 농도(500nM)는 높은 용량(5μM)보다 더 효과적인 것으로 입증되었습니다. 세포 대사를 강화함으로써 AMD의 잠재적인 치료 이점을 보여줍니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Muscle Strength Correlation in Physically Active Individuals
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Serum MOTS-c concentration positively correlated with average power, force of jumps, muscle mass, and BMI in 20 physically active volunteers. MOTS-c may serve as a biomarker for muscle strength and power in humans, independent of aerobic capacity.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 육체적으로 활동적인 개인의 근력 상관관계
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 혈청 MOTS-c 농도는 육체적으로 활동적인 지원자 20명의 평균 파워, 점프력, 근육량 및 BMI와 양의 상관관계가 있었습니다. MOTS-c는 유산소 능력과 관계없이 인간의 근력과 힘에 대한 바이오마커 역할을 할 수 있습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Comprehensive Review: Stress, Metabolism and Aging Mechanisms
latestResearchKo.excerpt: MOTS-c rapidly translocates into the nucleus within 30 min of metabolic stress, binding to NRF2 and ATF1/ATF7 transcription factors. Acts through Folate-AICAR-AMPK pathway to influence energy metabolism and insulin resistance. Age-related decline of 21% in 70-81 year-olds versus 18-30 year-olds.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 종합 검토: 스트레스, 대사 및 노화 메커니즘
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: MOTS-c는 대사 스트레스 30분 이내에 핵으로 빠르게 이동하여 NRF2 및 ATF1/ATF7 전사 인자에 결합합니다. Folate-AICAR-AMPK 경로를 통해 작용하여 에너지 대사와 인슐린 저항성에 영향을 줍니다. 18~30세에 비해 70~81세에서 연령 관련 감소가 21% 감소했습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: MOTS-c in Human Aging and Age-Related Diseases
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Comprehensive review of MOTS-c's role in human aging, metabolic regulation, and therapeutic potential. Covers molecular mechanisms, nuclear translocation, AMPK signaling, and age-dependent decline in circulating levels with implications for longevity interventions.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 인간 노화 및 연령 관련 질병의 MOTS-c
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 인간 노화, 대사 조절 및 치료 잠재력에서 MOTS-c의 역할에 대한 종합적인 검토. 장수 중재에 영향을 미치는 분자 메커니즘, 핵 전좌, AMPK 신호 전달 및 순환 수준의 연령에 따른 감소를 다룹니다.

na-semax-amidate.subtitle: Enhanced Nootropic Peptide | Cognitive Enhancement & NeuroprotectionNasal
na-semax-amidate.descriptionEn: N-Acetyl Semax Amidate is an enhanced and stabilized version of the Russian nootropic peptide Semax. Through acetylation and amidation modifications, it achieves superior stability, extended half-life, and enhanced bioavailability compared to standard Semax. This synthetic analog of ACTH (4-10) is designed for advanced cognitive enhancement and neuroprotection research.
na-semax-amidate.keyBenefits: Direct brain access, rapid onset, proven efficacy, bypasses blood-brain barrier, research-validated delivery method, extended half-life, enhanced cognitive effects

na-semax-amidate.descriptionKo: N-아세틸 세맥스 아미데이트(N-Acetyl Semax Amidate)는 러시아 누트로픽 펩타이드 세맥스(Semax)의 강화되고 안정화된 버전입니다. 아세틸화 및 아미드화 변형을 통해 표준 Semax에 비해 우수한 안정성, 연장된 반감기 및 향상된 생체 이용률을 달성합니다. 이 ACTH(4-10)의 합성 유사체는 고급 인지 향상 및 신경 보호 연구를 위해 설계되었습니다.
na-semax-amidate.keyBenefitsKo: 직접적인 뇌 접근, 신속한 개시, 입증된 효능, 혈액뇌관문 우회, 연구를 통해 검증된 전달 방법, 연장된 반감기, 강화된 인지 효과
na-semax-amidate.mechanismKo: 비강 내 NA Semax Amidate는 후각 신경을 통해 혈액 뇌 장벽을 우회하여 표준 SemaxMolecular InformationWeight1,007.16 DaLength7 아미노산에 비해 향상된 안정성과 장기간의 활동으로 뇌 조직에 직접 접근을 제공합니다. 유형수정된 ACTH 유사체아미노산 서열:Asn-Ala-Met-Glu-His-Phe-Pro-Gly-Pro-NH²* N-아세틸화 및 C-말단 향상된 생체 이용률을 위한 아미드 처리
na-semax-amidate.subtitleKo: 강화된 누트로픽 펩타이드 | 인지 향상 및 신경 보호코
safetyNotesKo: 멸균 용액만 사용하십시오.

latestResearchKo.title: Nootropic Peptides and Cognitive Enhancement Mechanisms
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Comprehensive review of synthetic ACTH analogs including NA Semax Amidate, examining mechanisms of action through BDNF enhancement and melanocortin receptor modulation.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 누트로픽 펩타이드 및 인지 향상 메커니즘
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: NA Semax Amidate를 포함한 합성 ACTH 유사체에 대한 종합적인 검토, BDNF 강화 및 멜라노코르틴 수용체 조절을 통한 작용 메커니즘 조사.

latestResearchKo.title: Enhanced Bioavailability of Modified Semax Analogs
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Study comparing pharmacokinetics of various Semax modifications, with NA Semax Amidate showing superior stability and longer half-life in preclinical models.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 변형된 Semax 유사체의 향상된 생체 이용률
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: NA Semax Amidate와 함께 다양한 Semax 변형의 약동학을 비교하는 연구는 전임상 모델에서 우수한 안정성과 더 긴 반감기를 나타냅니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Neuroprotective Strategies in Stroke Recovery
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Clinical review of peptide interventions in stroke rehabilitation, highlighting Semax's role in accelerating functional recovery through neuroplasticity enhancement.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 뇌졸중 회복의 신경보호 전략
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 뇌졸중 재활에서 펩타이드 개입에 대한 임상 검토는 신경가소성 강화를 통해 기능 회복을 가속화하는 Semax의 역할을 강조합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: ACTH Fragments and Cognitive Function
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Mechanistic study of how ACTH-derived peptides like Semax modulate memory formation and learning through hippocampal BDNF pathway activation.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: ACTH 단편과 인지 기능
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: Semax와 같은 ACTH 유래 펩타이드가 해마 BDNF 경로 활성화를 통해 기억 형성 및 학습을 조절하는 방법에 대한 기계적 연구입니다.

nad-plus.routeDetail: InjectableIM: deltoid, glute, thigh; SubQ: abdomen, thigh; IV: clinical setting
nad-plus.descriptionEn: Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide (NAD+) is a vital coenzyme found in every cell that plays a crucial role in energy production, DNA repair, and cellular metabolism. As NAD+ levels naturally decline with age, supplementation can support cellular health, boost energy, enhance cognitive function, and promote longevity.

nad-plus.descriptionKo: 니코틴아미드 아데닌 디뉴클레오티드(NAD+)는 에너지 생산, DNA 복구 및 세포 대사에 중요한 역할을 하는 모든 세포에서 발견되는 필수 조효소입니다. NAD+ 수준은 나이가 들수록 자연적으로 감소하므로 보충제는 세포 건강을 지원하고 에너지를 높이며 인지 기능을 강화하고 수명을 연장할 수 있습니다.
nad-plus.keyBenefitsKo: 최고의 생체 이용률(100%), 빠른 세포 흡수, 즉각적인 에너지 강화, 소화 제한 우회
nad-plus.mechanismKo: 혈류로 직접 전달하면 에너지 생성, DNA 복구 및 시르투인 활성화를 위한 최대 세포 가용성이 보장됩니다. 분자 정보무게663.43 DaLength다이뉴클레오티드(2개 뉴클레오티드)유형코엔자임/디뉴클레오티드아미노산 서열:아데닌-리보스-인산염-인산염-리보스-니코틴아미드* 니코틴아미드 아데닌 디뉴클레오티드의 산화 형태(NAD+); 대사 과정에서 환원형(NADH)으로 전환됩니다.

omberacetam.subtitle: Synthetic Dipeptide | Cognitive Enhancement NootropicNasal
omberacetam.routeDetail: OralOral tablet/capsule or sublingual powder; pair with choline source
omberacetam.descriptionEn: Omberacetam (also known as Noopept or GVS-111) is a synthetic nootropic dipeptide (N-phenylacetyl-L-prolylglycine ethyl ester) developed in Russia in 1996 for its potent cognitive-enhancing and neuroprotective properties. While structurally distinct from racetams, it's considered part of the nootropic family and functions as a prodrug that converts to the active metabolite cycloprolylglycine (CPG). Research indicates it may enhance memory, learning, and neuroplasticity through BDNF/NGF upregulation and glutamatergic modulation at doses 1000x lower than piracetam.
omberacetam.keyBenefits: Primary administration route, rapid oral bioavailability, convenient dosing, well-studied in clinical trials, peak absorption within 7 minutes
omberacetam.mechanism: Rapidly absorbed orally and converted to active metabolite cycloprolylglycine (CPG) which modulates AMPA/NMDA glutamate receptors and enhances cholinergic neurotransmission
omberacetam.protocolTiming: Morning and early afternoon dosing maximizes cognitive benefits while avoiding sleep disruptionPeptide InteractionsSemaxSynergisticSelankSynergisticNA-Semax-AmidateMonitor CombinationCerebrolysinCompatibleDihexaUse CautionCholine SourcesSynergisticHow to ReconstituteCalculatorImportant: Always use b

safetyNotes: Start with 10mg once daily to assess individual response before increasing dose
Always pair with a choline source (Alpha-GPC or CDP-Choline) to prevent headaches
Avoid evening dosing as cognitive stimulation may interfere with sleep
Do not combine with other strong cholinergic or glutamatergic compounds without caution
Not recommended for pregnant or breastfeeding women due to lack of safety data
Individuals with liver conditions should consult healthcare provider before use
stopSigns: Persistent headaches that don't respond to choline supplementation
Unusual irritability, anxiety, or agitation
Sleep disturbances including insomnia or vivid dreams
Gastrointestinal discomfort that worsens with continued use
Increased blood pressure or heart palpitations
Any signs of allergic reaction (rash, swelling, difficulty breathing)
omberacetam.descriptionKo: Omberacetam(Noopept 또는 GVS-111이라고도 함)은 강력한 인지 강화 및 신경 보호 특성을 위해 1996년 러시아에서 개발된 합성 누트로픽 디펩티드(N-페닐아세틸-L-프롤릴글리신 에틸 에스테르)입니다. 라세탐과 구조적으로 다르지만 누트로픽 계열의 일부로 간주되며 활성 대사산물인 사이클로프롤릴글리신(CPG)으로 전환되는 전구약물로 기능합니다. 연구에 따르면 피라세탐보다 1000배 낮은 용량에서도 BDNF/NGF 상향 조절 및 글루타메이트 조절을 통해 기억력, 학습 및 신경가소성을 향상시킬 수 있습니다.
omberacetam.keyBenefitsKo: 1차 투여 경로, 빠른 경구 생체 이용률, 편리한 투여, 임상 시험에서 많이 연구됨, 7분 이내 최대 흡수
omberacetam.mechanismKo: 경구로 빠르게 흡수되어 AMPA/NMDA 글루타메이트 수용체를 조절하고 콜린성 신경전달을 강화하는 활성 대사물질인 시클로프롤릴글리신(CPG)으로 전환됩니다.
safetyNotesKo: 복용량을 늘리기 전에 개별 반응을 평가하기 위해 1일 1회 10mg으로 시작하십시오.
두통을 예방하려면 항상 콜린 공급원(Alpha-GPC 또는 CDP-Choline)과 쌍을 이루십시오.
인지 자극은 수면을 방해할 수 있으므로 저녁 투여를 피하세요.
주의 없이 다른 강력한 콜린성 또는 글루타메이트성 화합물과 결합하지 마십시오.
안전성 데이터가 부족하여 임신 또는 수유 중인 여성에게는 권장되지 않습니다.
간 질환이 있는 사람은 사용 전 의료 서비스 제공자와 상담해야 합니다.
stopSignsKo: 콜린 보충에 반응하지 않는 지속적인 두통
비정상적인 과민성, 불안 또는 동요
불면증이나 생생한 꿈을 포함한 수면 장애
계속 사용하면 악화되는 위장 불편감
혈압이 증가하거나 심장이 두근거림
알레르기 반응 징후(발진, 부기, 호흡 곤란)

latestResearchKo.title: Physicochemical Structure Analysis
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Comprehensive 2024 analysis using X-ray crystallography and spectroscopy revealed novel structural insights into Omberacetam's solid-state properties and polymorphism, advancing pharmaceutical formulation understanding.
latestResearchKo.source: Journal of Pharmaceutical and Biomedical Analysis

latestResearchKo.excerptKo: X선 결정학 및 분광학을 사용한 포괄적인 2024년 분석을 통해 Omberacetam의 고체 특성 및 다형성에 대한 새로운 구조적 통찰력이 밝혀져 의약품 제제에 대한 이해가 향상되었습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Anti-Amyloid Neuroprotection Mechanisms
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Research confirms Omberacetam's ability to protect against α-synuclein cytotoxicity and β-amyloid neurotoxicity through multiple pathways including oxidative stress reduction and calcium homeostasis.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 항아밀로이드 신경보호 메커니즘
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구를 통해 Omberacetam이 산화 스트레스 감소 및 칼슘 항상성을 포함한 여러 경로를 통해 α-시누클레인 세포 독성 및 β-아밀로이드 신경 독성으로부터 보호하는 능력을 확인했습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Cycloprolylglycine Metabolite Activity
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Studies demonstrate that Omberacetam's primary metabolite CPG (also an IGF-1 metabolite) is responsible for sustained cognitive effects through AMPA receptor modulation and enhanced synaptic plasticity.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 시클로프롤릴글리신 대사산물 활동
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구에 따르면 Omberacetam의 1차 대사산물인 CPG(IGF-1 대사산물이기도 함)는 AMPA 수용체 조절 및 강화된 시냅스 가소성을 통해 지속적인 인지 효과를 담당하는 것으로 나타났습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: HIF-1 Activation Pathway
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Emerging research suggests Omberacetam activates Hypoxia-inducible factor (HIF-1), potentially explaining its neuroprotective effects under ischemic conditions while raising considerations for use in certain populations.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: HIF-1 활성화 경로
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 새로운 연구에 따르면 Omberacetam은 저산소증 유발 인자(HIF-1)를 활성화하여 잠재적으로 허혈성 상태에서 신경 보호 효과를 설명하는 동시에 특정 인구 집단에서의 사용에 대한 고려를 제기합니다.

orforglipron.subtitle: Small-Molecule GLP-1 Receptor Agonist | Weight Loss & Diabetes
orforglipron.descriptionEn: Orforglipron (LY-3502970) is an oral, non-peptide GLP-1 receptor agonist - the first small-molecule GLP-1 to complete Phase 3 trials. Unlike injectable GLP-1s, it requires no injections, refrigeration, or food/water restrictions. Clinical trials show substantial weight loss (up to 12.4% at 72 weeks) and robust glycemic control (HbA1c reductions of 1.3-1.6%). Developed by Chugai Pharmaceutical and licensed to Eli Lilly, FDA approval expected 2026.
orforglipron.keyBenefits: Significant weight loss (up to 12.4% at 72 weeks), robust diabetes control (HbA1c reduction 1.3-1.6%), once-daily oral tablet, no refrigeration or food restrictions, reduced cardiovascular risk markers, preserved muscle mass during weight loss
orforglipron.mechanism: Small-molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist with biased signaling - preferentially activates G protein/cAMP pathways (enhancing insulin secretion, suppressing glucagon, delaying gastric emptying, reducing appetite) while minimizing receptor desensitization. 79.1% oral bioavailability with 29-49 hour half-life supporting once-daily dosing.
orforglipron.protocolTiming: Orforglipron can be taken at any time of day, with or without food or water. Choose a consistent time daily for optimal compliance. No fasting period or timing restrictions required.Peptide InteractionsSemaglutideAvoid CombinationTirzepatideAvoid CombinationLiraglutideAvoid CombinationInsulinMonitor

interactions.name: Semaglutide
interactions.description: Both are GLP-1 agonists - combining increases risk of severe hypoglycemia and excessive GI side effects including intractable nausea and vomiting

interactions.name: Tirzepatide
interactions.description: Dual GIP/GLP-1 agonist overlaps with GLP-1 mechanism - combination contraindicated due to additive hypoglycemic effects and severe GI toxicity

interactions.name: Liraglutide
interactions.description: Another GLP-1 agonist - concurrent use contraindicated due to overlapping mechanisms and compounded adverse effects

interactions.name: Insulin
interactions.description: Orforglipron enhances insulin sensitivity - may require significant insulin dose reduction to prevent hypoglycemia, requires close monitoring

interactions.name: Metformin
interactions.description: Complementary mechanisms for diabetes management - Phase 3 trials combining orforglipron with metformin showed enhanced efficacy without increased adverse events

interactions.name: Dapagliflozin
interactions.description: SGLT-2 inhibitor with distinct mechanism - combination being evaluated in Phase 3 ACHIEVE-2 trial for potential additive metabolic benefits

interactions.name: CJC-1295
interactions.description: Growth hormone secretagogue may help preserve lean muscle mass during GLP-1-induced weight loss without interaction concerns

interactions.name: Ipamorelin
interactions.description: May help maintain metabolic rate and muscle preservation during caloric restriction from orforglipron therapy

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: No known interactions - may theoretically support gut health and potentially mitigate GI side effects common with GLP-1 agonists

interactions.name: 5-Amino-1MQ
interactions.description: NNMT inhibition mechanism is distinct from GLP-1 pathway - may complement metabolic effects for enhanced optimization

quickStart.dose: Start 3-6mg daily, escalate every 4 weeks as tolerated
quickStart.frequency: Once daily, same time each day preferred
quickStart.bestTiming: Any time of day, with or without food, with or without water
quickStart.effectsTimeline: Appetite reduction 1-3 days, glucose improvements 1-4 weeks, weight loss 2-4 weeks, peak effects 16-36 weeks
quickStart.storageNote: Room temperature (15-30°C), no refrigeration required
quickStart.breakBetween: Consult prescriber before discontinuation to manage potential rebound effects

weightLoss.title: Obesity Management Without Diabetes
weightLoss.description: FDA-approved based on ATTAIN-1 trial: 17.2mg dose achieved 11.1% weight loss (24.9 lbs) at 72 weeks in non-diabetic adults with obesity. 9mg achieved 8.3% (18.9 lbs), 5.5mg achieved 7.4% (17.2 lbs). First oral small-molecule GLP-1 approved for weight management.

weightLoss.title: Obesity Management With Type 2 Diabetes
weightLoss.description: ATTAIN-2 Phase 3 trial showed 9.6% weight loss (21.2 lbs) with 17.2mg in patients with both obesity and diabetes. 9mg achieved 7% (15.9 lbs), 5.5mg achieved 5.1% (11.7 lbs).

weightLoss.title: Cardiometabolic Risk Factor Improvement
weightLoss.description: Significant improvements in waist circumference, systolic blood pressure (8-12 mmHg reductions), triglycerides (-20-30%), and non-HDL cholesterol across Phase 3 trials. Comprehensive metabolic syndrome reversal.

weightLoss.title: Prediabetes Prevention
weightLoss.description: Among 1,127 ATTAIN-1 participants with prediabetes at baseline, up to 91% achieved near-normal blood sugar levels vs 42% with placebo, demonstrating diabetes prevention potential.

diabetes.title: Early Type 2 Diabetes Management
diabetes.description: ACHIEVE-1 Phase 3 trial showed HbA1c reductions of 1.3-1.6% from 8.0% baseline over 40 weeks. 76.2% of patients achieved HbA1c <7%, 66.0% achieved ≤6.5%, positioning orforglipron as potential first-line oral therapy.

diabetes.title: Insulin Resistance Improvement
diabetes.description: Significant improvements in insulin sensitivity indices and fasting glucose reduction observed within 4 weeks of therapy initiation. Glucose-dependent mechanism prevents hypoglycemia risk in non-diabetic patients.

diabetes.title: Beta Cell Function Preservation
diabetes.description: GLP-1R agonism protects pancreatic beta cell function through multiple mechanisms including reduced glucotoxicity, enhanced glucose-responsive insulin secretion, and potential anti-apoptotic effects.

diabetes.title: Long-term Glycemic Durability
diabetes.description: Biased agonism profile favoring G protein over β-arrestin may reduce receptor desensitization, potentially improving sustained glycemic control compared to peptide GLP-1 agonists. Long-term studies ongoing.

cardiovascular.title: Cardiovascular Risk Marker Reduction
cardiovascular.description: Significant improvements in blood pressure (systolic reductions 8-12 mmHg), triglycerides (-20-30%), HDL cholesterol increases, and reductions in small dense LDL particles observed across Phase 3 trials.

cardiovascular.title: Obesity-Related Comorbidity Management
cardiovascular.description: Being investigated for obstructive sleep apnea and hypertension in adults with obesity. GLP-1 class effects suggest potential benefits for cardiovascular event reduction, pending dedicated outcomes trials.

cardiovascular.title: Metabolic Syndrome Reversal
cardiovascular.description: Comprehensive improvements in all five metabolic syndrome criteria (waist circumference, blood pressure, triglycerides, HDL cholesterol, fasting glucose) demonstrated in clinical trials.

limitations.title: Designed for Oral Administration
limitations.description: Orforglipron was engineered specifically for oral delivery. Its small-molecule, non-peptide structure provides high oral bioavailability (79.1%), eliminating the need for injectable formulation.

limitations.title: No Clinical Development for Injectable Route
limitations.description: All Phase 1, 2, and 3 clinical trials evaluated oral administration only. No injectable formulation has been developed or studied. The entire development program focuses on oral convenience.

limitations.title: Competitive Advantage Over Injectables
limitations.description: Orforglipron's key innovation is eliminating injections while achieving efficacy comparable to injectable peptide GLP-1 agonists like semaglutide and tirzepatide. Injectable formulation would negate primary advantage.

limitations.title: Systemic Receptor Distribution Required
limitations.description: GLP-1 receptors mediating metabolic effects are in pancreatic beta cells, GI tract, hypothalamus, and cardiovascular system. These require systemic drug delivery that topical application cannot provide.

limitations.title: Insufficient Systemic Absorption
limitations.description: Even with orforglipron's relatively small molecular size, topical application cannot achieve blood concentrations necessary for GLP-1 receptor activation and therapeutic glucose/weight effects.

limitations.title: No Clinical Development for Topical Route
limitations.description: No topical formulations have been studied or developed. All clinical evidence supports oral administration only for achieving therapeutic systemic exposure.

latestResearch.title: FDA Approves Foundayo (Orforglipron) - First Small-Molecule Oral GLP-1 for Weight Loss
latestResearch.excerpt: FDA approved Foundayo under the National Priority Voucher program on April 1, 2026 - the fastest new molecular entity approval since 2002. Approved for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related comorbidities. Available in 6 tablet strengths (0.8mg to 17.2mg) with no food or water restrictions. Pricing starts at $25/month with insurance or $149/month self-pay.

latestResearch.title: Orforglipron, an Oral Small-Molecule GLP-1 Receptor Agonist for Obesity Treatment
latestResearch.excerpt: Phase 3 ATTAIN-1 trial published in NEJM demonstrating up to 11.1% weight loss (24.9 lbs) at 72 weeks with the highest dose in adults without diabetes. 59.6% achieved ≥10% weight loss. Established orforglipron as the first successful oral small-molecule GLP-1 agonist.

latestResearch.title: Orforglipron, an Oral Small-Molecule GLP-1 Receptor Agonist, in Early Type 2 Diabetes
latestResearch.excerpt: ACHIEVE-1 Phase 3 trial showing robust HbA1c reductions of 1.3-1.6% with 76.2% achieving ADA target HbA1c <7%. First oral GLP-1 without food/water restrictions to successfully complete diabetes Phase 3 trial.

latestResearch.title: ATTAIN-2: Orforglipron in Obesity with Type 2 Diabetes
latestResearch.excerpt: Phase 3 trial demonstrating 10.5% weight loss in patients with both obesity and diabetes, with 72.8% achieving clinically meaningful ≥5% weight loss. Confirms efficacy across metabolic disease spectrum.

latestResearch.title: Orforglipron: Pioneering an Oral GLP-1 Receptor Agonist in Metabolic Disease
latestResearch.excerpt: Comprehensive review of orforglipron's biased agonism mechanism, preferentially activating G protein/cAMP pathways while minimizing β-arrestin recruitment. May reduce receptor desensitization and improve sustained efficacy compared to peptide GLP-1 agonists.

latestResearch.title: Orforglipron (LY3502970): A Novel Non-Peptide Oral GLP-1 Receptor Agonist - Phase 1 Studies
latestResearch.excerpt: Detailed pharmacokinetic analysis showing 29-49 hour half-life, 79.1% oral bioavailability, and no food effect. Phase 1 studies demonstrate safety profile consistent with injectable GLP-1RAs with convenient once-daily dosing.

latestResearch.title: Efficacy and Safety of Oral Orforglipron in Type 2 Diabetes: Phase 2 Dose-Response Study
latestResearch.excerpt: Phase 2 trial comparing orforglipron to injectable dulaglutide demonstrating superior or equivalent HbA1c reductions and weight loss across dose range. Established optimal dosing for Phase 3 development.

safetyNotes: BOXED WARNING: May cause thyroid C-cell tumors including medullary thyroid carcinoma (MTC). Contraindicated in patients with personal/family history of MTC or Multiple Endocrine Neoplasia syndrome type 2 (MEN 2)
Start at 0.8mg daily, titrate to 2.5mg after 30 days, then 5.5mg after 60 days - gradual titration minimizes GI side effects
Do not use with other GLP-1 receptor agonist medicines
Monitor for signs of acute pancreatitis (severe, persistent abdominal pain with or without nausea/vomiting) - stop taking Foundayo immediately if suspected
Common side effects: nausea, constipation, diarrhea, vomiting, indigestion, abdominal pain, headache, bloating, fatigue, belching, heartburn, gas, and hair loss
May cause dehydration leading to kidney problems - drink fluids to reduce risk, especially with nausea/vomiting/diarrhea
May affect oral contraceptive efficacy - use alternative birth control for 30 days after starting and after each dose increase
May require adjustment of insulin or sulfonylurea doses to prevent low blood sugar (hypoglycemia)
Not safe during pregnancy (may harm unborn baby) or breastfeeding - pregnancy exposure registry available at 1-800-LillyRx
Gallbladder problems reported - monitor for upper abdominal pain, fever, jaundice, or clay-colored stools
Tell healthcare providers you take Foundayo before any surgery or procedure using anesthesia (aspiration risk)
If doses missed for 7+ consecutive days, contact healthcare provider about how to restart treatment
stopSigns: Severe or persistent abdominal pain radiating to back (potential pancreatitis)
Neck lumps, hoarseness, difficulty swallowing, or neck swelling (thyroid concerns)
Severe nausea/vomiting preventing adequate nutrition or hydration
Signs of severe hypoglycemia if diabetic (confusion, sweating, rapid heartbeat, loss of consciousness)
Persistent diarrhea leading to dehydration (decreased urination, dizziness, dry mouth)
Severe allergic reactions (rash, hives, difficulty breathing, facial/throat swelling)
Suicidal thoughts, severe depression, or significant mood changes
Severe upper right abdominal pain with nausea (potential gallbladder problems)
Unusual fatigue, dark urine, yellowing of skin/eyes (potential liver concerns)
Vision changes or persistent eye pain
orforglipron.descriptionKo: 오르포글리프론(LY-3502970)은 경구용 비펩타이드성 GLP-1 수용체 작용제로서 임상 3상 시험을 완료한 최초의 소분자 GLP-1이다. 주사 가능한 GLP-1과 달리 주사, 냉장 또는 음식/물 제한이 필요하지 않습니다. 임상 시험에서는 상당한 체중 감소(72주차에 최대 12.4%)와 강력한 혈당 조절(HbA1c 1.3~1.6% 감소)이 나타났습니다. Chugai Pharmaceutical에서 개발하고 Eli Lilly에 라이선스를 부여한 FDA 승인은 2026년으로 예상됩니다.
orforglipron.keyBenefitsKo: 상당한 체중 감소(72주차에 최대 12.4%), 강력한 당뇨병 관리(HbA1c 감소 1.3-1.6%), 1일 1회 경구 정제, 냉장 또는 식품 제한 없음, 심혈관 위험 지표 감소, 체중 감량 중 근육량 보존
orforglipron.mechanismKo: 편향된 신호 전달 기능을 갖춘 소분자 GLP-1 수용체 작용제 - 수용체 둔감화를 최소화하면서 G 단백질/cAMP 경로(인슐린 분비 강화, 글루카곤 억제, 위 배출 지연, 식욕 감소)를 우선적으로 활성화합니다. 1일 1회 투여를 지원하는 29~49시간의 반감기로 경구 생체 이용률이 79.1%입니다.
orforglipron.subtitleKo: 소분자 GLP-1 수용체 작용제 | 체중 감소 및 당뇨병
safetyNotesKo: 박스형 경고: 갑상선 수질암종(MTC)을 포함한 갑상선 C세포 종양을 유발할 수 있습니다. MTC 또는 다발성 내분비 종양 증후군 2형(MEN 2)의 개인/가족력이 있는 환자에게는 금기입니다.
매일 0.8mg으로 시작하여 30일 후에 2.5mg으로 적정하고, 60일 후에 5.5mg으로 적정합니다. 점진적 적정으로 위장관 부작용이 최소화됩니다.
다른 GLP-1 수용체 작용제 약물과 함께 사용하지 마십시오
급성 췌장염(메스꺼움/구토를 동반하거나 동반하지 않는 심하고 지속적인 복통)의 징후가 있는지 모니터링하십시오. 의심되는 경우 즉시 Foundayo 복용을 중단하십시오.
일반적인 부작용: 메스꺼움, 변비, 설사, 구토, 소화불량, 복통, 두통, 팽만감, 피로, 트림, 가슴쓰림, 가스, 탈모
신장 문제로 이어지는 탈수를 일으킬 수 있습니다. 특히 메스꺼움/구토/설사 시 위험을 줄이기 위해 수분을 섭취하십시오.
경구 피임 효과에 영향을 미칠 수 있음 - 시작 후 30일 동안 그리고 각 용량 증가 후 대체 피임법을 사용하십시오.
저혈당(저혈당증)을 예방하기 위해 인슐린 또는 설포닐우레아 용량 조정이 필요할 수 있습니다.
임신(태아에게 해를 끼칠 수 있음) 또는 모유 수유 중에는 안전하지 않습니다. 임신 노출 등록은 1-800-LillyRx에서 이용 가능합니다.
담낭 문제가 보고되었습니다 - 상복부 통증, 발열, 황달 또는 점토색 변이 있는지 모니터링합니다.
마취를 사용하는 수술이나 시술 전에 Foundayo를 복용하고 있다고 의료 서비스 제공자에게 알리십시오(흡인 위험).
7일 이상 연속으로 복용량을 놓친 경우 치료를 다시 시작하는 방법에 대해 의료 서비스 제공자에게 문의하십시오.
stopSignsKo: 등으로 방사되는 심하거나 지속적인 복통(잠재적 췌장염)
목 덩어리, 쉰 목소리, 삼키기 어려움 또는 목 부종(갑상선 문제)
심각한 메스꺼움/구토로 인해 적절한 영양이나 수분 공급이 방해됨
당뇨병이 있는 경우 심각한 저혈당 징후(혼란, 발한, 빠른 심장 박동, 의식 상실)
탈수로 이어지는 지속적인 설사(배뇨 감소, 현기증, 구강 건조)
심한 알레르기 반응(발진, 두드러기, 호흡곤란, 얼굴/목 부기)
자살 충동, 심각한 우울증 또는 심각한 기분 변화
메스꺼움을 동반한 심한 오른쪽 상부 복통(잠재적 담낭 문제)
비정상적인 피로, 어두운 소변, 피부/눈의 황변(잠재적인 간 문제)
시력 변화 또는 지속적인 눈 통증

latestResearchKo.title: FDA Approves Foundayo (Orforglipron) - First Small-Molecule Oral GLP-1 for Weight Loss
latestResearchKo.excerpt: FDA approved Foundayo under the National Priority Voucher program on April 1, 2026 - the fastest new molecular entity approval since 2002. Approved for adults with obesity or overweight with weight-related comorbidities. Available in 6 tablet strengths (0.8mg to 17.2mg) with no food or water restrictions. Pricing starts at $25/month with insurance or $149/month self-pay.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: FDA, Foundayo(Orforglipron) 승인 - 체중 감량을 위한 최초의 저분자 경구용 GLP-1
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: FDA는 2026년 4월 1일 National Priority Voucher 프로그램에 따라 Foundayo를 승인했습니다. 이는 2002년 이후 가장 빠른 새로운 분자 실체 승인입니다. 체중 관련 동반 질환이 있는 비만 또는 과체중 성인에게 승인되었습니다. 음식이나 물 제한 없이 6가지 정제 용량(0.8mg ~ 17.2mg)으로 제공됩니다. 가격은 보험 포함 월 $25 또는 자기 부담 월 $149부터 시작됩니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Orforglipron, an Oral Small-Molecule GLP-1 Receptor Agonist for Obesity Treatment
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Phase 3 ATTAIN-1 trial published in NEJM demonstrating up to 11.1% weight loss (24.9 lbs) at 72 weeks with the highest dose in adults without diabetes. 59.6% achieved ≥10% weight loss. Established orforglipron as the first successful oral small-molecule GLP-1 agonist.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 비만 치료를 위한 경구용 소분자 GLP-1 수용체 작용제 오르포글리프론(Orforglipron)
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: NEJM에 발표된 3상 ATTAIN-1 시험은 당뇨병이 없는 성인에서 가장 높은 용량으로 72주에 최대 11.1%의 체중 감소(24.9lbs)를 보여주었습니다. 59.6%가 10% 이상의 체중 감량을 달성했습니다. 최초의 성공적인 경구용 소분자 GLP-1 작용제로 orforglipron을 확립했습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Orforglipron, an Oral Small-Molecule GLP-1 Receptor Agonist, in Early Type 2 Diabetes
latestResearchKo.excerpt: ACHIEVE-1 Phase 3 trial showing robust HbA1c reductions of 1.3-1.6% with 76.2% achieving ADA target HbA1c <7%. First oral GLP-1 without food/water restrictions to successfully complete diabetes Phase 3 trial.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 초기 제2형 당뇨병에 대한 경구용 소분자 GLP-1 수용체 작용제인 오르포글리프론(Orforglipron)
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: ACHIEVE-1 3상 시험에서는 76.2%가 ADA 목표 HbA1c <7%를 달성하여 1.3~1.6%의 강력한 HbA1c 감소를 보여줍니다. 음식/물 제한이 없는 최초의 경구용 GLP-1로 당뇨병 3상 시험을 성공적으로 완료했습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: ATTAIN-2: Orforglipron in Obesity with Type 2 Diabetes
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Phase 3 trial demonstrating 10.5% weight loss in patients with both obesity and diabetes, with 72.8% achieving clinically meaningful ≥5% weight loss. Confirms efficacy across metabolic disease spectrum.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: ATTAIN-2: 제2형 당뇨병을 동반한 비만의 오르포글리프론
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 비만과 당뇨병 환자 모두에서 10.5%의 체중 감소를 입증한 3상 시험에서 72.8%가 임상적으로 의미 있는 ≥5% 체중 감소를 달성했습니다. 대사질환 스펙트럼 전반에 걸쳐 효능을 확인합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Orforglipron: Pioneering an Oral GLP-1 Receptor Agonist in Metabolic Disease
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Comprehensive review of orforglipron's biased agonism mechanism, preferentially activating G protein/cAMP pathways while minimizing β-arrestin recruitment. May reduce receptor desensitization and improve sustained efficacy compared to peptide GLP-1 agonists.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: Orforglipron: 대사 질환에 대한 경구용 GLP-1 수용체 작용제 개척
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: β-어레스틴 모집을 최소화하면서 G 단백질/cAMP 경로를 우선적으로 활성화하는 orforglipron의 편향된 작용 메커니즘에 대한 종합적인 검토입니다. 펩타이드 GLP-1 작용제에 비해 수용체 둔감화를 줄이고 지속적인 효능을 향상시킬 수 있습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Orforglipron (LY3502970): A Novel Non-Peptide Oral GLP-1 Receptor Agonist - Phase 1 Studies
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Detailed pharmacokinetic analysis showing 29-49 hour half-life, 79.1% oral bioavailability, and no food effect. Phase 1 studies demonstrate safety profile consistent with injectable GLP-1RAs with convenient once-daily dosing.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: Orforglipron(LY3502970): 새로운 비펩타이드 경구 GLP-1 수용체 작용제 - 1상 연구
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 자세한 약동학 분석을 통해 반감기는 29~49시간, 경구 생체이용률은 79.1%, 식품 효과는 없음을 보여줍니다. 1상 연구에서는 편리한 1일 1회 투여 방식의 주사 가능한 GLP-1RA와 일치하는 안전성 프로필을 입증했습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Efficacy and Safety of Oral Orforglipron in Type 2 Diabetes: Phase 2 Dose-Response Study
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Phase 2 trial comparing orforglipron to injectable dulaglutide demonstrating superior or equivalent HbA1c reductions and weight loss across dose range. Established optimal dosing for Phase 3 development.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 제2형 당뇨병에 대한 경구 오르포글리프론의 효능 및 안전성: 제2상 용량 반응 연구
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 오르포글리프론과 주사용 둘라글루타이드를 비교하는 2상 시험에서는 용량 범위 전반에 걸쳐 HbA1c 감소 및 체중 감소가 우수하거나 동등함을 입증했습니다. 3상 개발을 위한 최적의 투여량을 확립했습니다.

weightLoss.title: Obesity Management Without Diabetes
weightLoss.description: FDA-approved based on ATTAIN-1 trial: 17.2mg dose achieved 11.1% weight loss (24.9 lbs) at 72 weeks in non-diabetic adults with obesity. 9mg achieved 8.3% (18.9 lbs), 5.5mg achieved 7.4% (17.2 lbs). First oral small-molecule GLP-1 approved for weight management.

weightLoss.title: Obesity Management With Type 2 Diabetes
weightLoss.description: ATTAIN-2 Phase 3 trial showed 9.6% weight loss (21.2 lbs) with 17.2mg in patients with both obesity and diabetes. 9mg achieved 7% (15.9 lbs), 5.5mg achieved 5.1% (11.7 lbs).

weightLoss.title: Cardiometabolic Risk Factor Improvement
weightLoss.description: Significant improvements in waist circumference, systolic blood pressure (8-12 mmHg reductions), triglycerides (-20-30%), and non-HDL cholesterol across Phase 3 trials. Comprehensive metabolic syndrome reversal.

weightLoss.title: Prediabetes Prevention
weightLoss.description: Among 1,127 ATTAIN-1 participants with prediabetes at baseline, up to 91% achieved near-normal blood sugar levels vs 42% with placebo, demonstrating diabetes prevention potential.

diabetes.title: Early Type 2 Diabetes Management
diabetes.description: ACHIEVE-1 Phase 3 trial showed HbA1c reductions of 1.3-1.6% from 8.0% baseline over 40 weeks. 76.2% of patients achieved HbA1c <7%, 66.0% achieved ≤6.5%, positioning orforglipron as potential first-line oral therapy.

diabetes.title: Insulin Resistance Improvement
diabetes.description: Significant improvements in insulin sensitivity indices and fasting glucose reduction observed within 4 weeks of therapy initiation. Glucose-dependent mechanism prevents hypoglycemia risk in non-diabetic patients.

diabetes.title: Beta Cell Function Preservation
diabetes.description: GLP-1R agonism protects pancreatic beta cell function through multiple mechanisms including reduced glucotoxicity, enhanced glucose-responsive insulin secretion, and potential anti-apoptotic effects.

diabetes.title: Long-term Glycemic Durability
diabetes.description: Biased agonism profile favoring G protein over β-arrestin may reduce receptor desensitization, potentially improving sustained glycemic control compared to peptide GLP-1 agonists. Long-term studies ongoing.

cardiovascular.title: Cardiovascular Risk Marker Reduction
cardiovascular.description: Significant improvements in blood pressure (systolic reductions 8-12 mmHg), triglycerides (-20-30%), HDL cholesterol increases, and reductions in small dense LDL particles observed across Phase 3 trials.

cardiovascular.title: Obesity-Related Comorbidity Management
cardiovascular.description: Being investigated for obstructive sleep apnea and hypertension in adults with obesity. GLP-1 class effects suggest potential benefits for cardiovascular event reduction, pending dedicated outcomes trials.

cardiovascular.title: Metabolic Syndrome Reversal
cardiovascular.description: Comprehensive improvements in all five metabolic syndrome criteria (waist circumference, blood pressure, triglycerides, HDL cholesterol, fasting glucose) demonstrated in clinical trials.

limitations.title: Designed for Oral Administration
limitations.description: Orforglipron was engineered specifically for oral delivery. Its small-molecule, non-peptide structure provides high oral bioavailability (79.1%), eliminating the need for injectable formulation.

limitations.title: No Clinical Development for Injectable Route
limitations.description: All Phase 1, 2, and 3 clinical trials evaluated oral administration only. No injectable formulation has been developed or studied. The entire development program focuses on oral convenience.

limitations.title: Competitive Advantage Over Injectables
limitations.description: Orforglipron's key innovation is eliminating injections while achieving efficacy comparable to injectable peptide GLP-1 agonists like semaglutide and tirzepatide. Injectable formulation would negate primary advantage.

limitations.title: Systemic Receptor Distribution Required
limitations.description: GLP-1 receptors mediating metabolic effects are in pancreatic beta cells, GI tract, hypothalamus, and cardiovascular system. These require systemic drug delivery that topical application cannot provide.

limitations.title: Insufficient Systemic Absorption
limitations.description: Even with orforglipron's relatively small molecular size, topical application cannot achieve blood concentrations necessary for GLP-1 receptor activation and therapeutic glucose/weight effects.

limitations.title: No Clinical Development for Topical Route
limitations.description: No topical formulations have been studied or developed. All clinical evidence supports oral administration only for achieving therapeutic systemic exposure.

oxytocin.subtitle: Neurohypophysial Peptide | Social Bonding & Reproductive Hormone
oxytocin.descriptionEn: Oxytocin is a nine-amino-acid peptide hormone and neuropeptide naturally produced in the hypothalamus and released by the posterior pituitary. Known as the "love hormone" or "bonding hormone," it plays fundamental roles in social bonding, trust, empathy, sexual reproduction, childbirth, and lactation. Synthetic oxytocin (Pitocin/Syntocinon) is FDA-approved for labor induction and postpartum hemorrhage control, while intranasal formulations are being researched for autism spectrum disorders, anxiety, depression, PTSD, chronic pain, and sexual dysfunction.
oxytocin.keyBenefits: FDA-approved for labor induction and postpartum hemorrhage control, precise dosing via IV infusion, immediate onset, well-established safety profile in obstetric settings
oxytocin.mechanism: Binds to oxytocin receptors (OXTR) on uterine smooth muscle cells, triggering calcium influx and myometrial contractions. Also stimulates prostaglandin release to enhance uterine sensitivity.Molecular InformationWeight1,007.19 DaLength9 amino acidsTypeCyclic nonapeptideAmino Acid Sequence:Cys-Tyr-Ile-Gln-Asn-Cys-Pro-Leu-Gly-NH2* Disulfide bridge between Cys1-Cys6 forming cyclic structure, C-termin
oxytocin.protocolTiming: Injectable oxytocin is used in clinical settings for labor and delivery. Onset is immediate (IV) to 3-5 minutes (IM). Effects are short-lived requiring continuous infusion for labor.Peptide InteractionsVasopressin (AVP)Monitor CombinationSelankSynergisticSemaxCompatiblePT-141 (Bremelanotide)Synergis

interactions.name: Vasopressin (AVP)
interactions.description: Structurally similar peptides (differ by only 2 amino acids) with overlapping receptor affinity. Both act on oxytocin and vasopressin receptors with potential for additive effects.

interactions.name: Selank
interactions.description: Complementary anxiolytic effects through different mechanisms. Selank modulates GABA while oxytocin acts on central oxytocin receptors for stress reduction.

interactions.name: Semax
interactions.description: No known interactions. Different mechanisms - Semax for cognitive enhancement, oxytocin for social/emotional support.

interactions.name: PT-141 (Bremelanotide)
interactions.description: Complementary effects on sexual function. PT-141 acts on melanocortin receptors while oxytocin enhances bonding, arousal, and orgasm intensity.

interactions.name: Kisspeptin
interactions.description: Both involved in reproductive function through different pathways. Kisspeptin stimulates GnRH while oxytocin enhances arousal and bonding.

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: No known direct interactions. Different mechanisms - BPC-157 for tissue repair, oxytocin for social/reproductive functions.

interactions.name: SSRI Antidepressants
interactions.description: SSRIs may affect endogenous oxytocin levels. Combined use may have additive effects on mood but should be monitored by healthcare provider.

interactions.name: Benzodiazepines
interactions.description: Both have anxiolytic effects through different mechanisms. Combined use may cause enhanced sedation or additive effects on blood pressure.

interactions.name: Prostaglandins
interactions.description: Prostaglandins enhance oxytocin sensitivity in uterine tissue. Often used together clinically for labor induction.

interactions.name: Alcohol
interactions.description: Alcohol suppresses oxytocin release and may reduce therapeutic effects. Both can affect blood pressure and judgment.

qualityGood: FDA-approved pharmaceutical productUse only FDA-approved oxytocin injection (Pitocin) from licensed
Clear, colorless solutionOxytocin injection should be clear without particles or discoloration
Proper packaging and labelingVerify lot number, expiration date, and concentration (10 units/mL typi
qualityBad: Cloudy or discolored solutionDo not use if solution appears cloudy, contains particles, or is discol
effectsTimeline: 5 min)May cause transient blood pressure changesCommon side effects: nausea, vomiting, headache
sideEffects: 자궁 수축 (여성, 특히 임신 중 — 절대 사용 금지)
⚠️ 임신 중 절대 사용 금지 (자궁 수축 유발)

quickStart.frequency: As clinically indicated under medical supervisionWhere to InjectIV infusion (primary) or IM (postpartum)Injection Timing
quickStart.effectsTimeline: IV onset: 1-3 minutes, IM onset: 3-5 minutes, duration 30-60 minutes
quickStart.storageNote: Refrigerate 2-8°C, protect from light

obstetric.title: Labor Induction
obstetric.description: FDA-approved for initiation or augmentation of uterine contractions when vaginal delivery is medically indicated

obstetric.title: Postpartum Hemorrhage Prevention
obstetric.description: FDA-approved for control of postpartum bleeding through uterine contraction stimulation during third stage of labor

obstetric.title: Incomplete Abortion Management
obstetric.description: Adjunctive therapy for management of incomplete or inevitable abortion in second trimester

research.title: Autism Spectrum Disorders (Research)
research.description: Injectable forms used in some research settings, though intranasal is preferred for central effects

research.title: Lactation Support
research.description: Historical use for milk ejection reflex stimulation (intranasal now preferred)

research.title: Limited Clinical Data
research.description: Most oxytocin research uses intranasal route; sublingual formulations have less clinical evidence

research.title: Bioavailability Considerations
research.description: Lower bioavailability (~4.5%) compared to intranasal (~11%) may require higher doses

social.title: Autism Spectrum Disorders
social.description: Extensive research on social cognition improvements, though large trials show mixed results. May benefit specific subpopulations.

social.title: Social Anxiety Disorder
social.description: Studies show decreased amygdala reactivity to social threats and normalized functional connectivity in brain regions involved in social processing.

social.title: Trust and Social Bonding
social.description: Research demonstrates enhanced interpersonal trust, empathy, and in-group bonding following intranasal administration.

mental.title: PTSD Treatment Augmentation
mental.description: Promising results when combined with exposure therapy, showing reduced PTSD and depression symptoms and improved therapeutic alliance.

mental.title: Depression and Anxiety
mental.description: Emerging evidence for anxiolytic and antidepressant effects, particularly in stress-related conditions. Works through cortisol reduction and anti-inflammatory pathways.

mental.title: Schizophrenia Social Deficits
mental.description: Research shows potential for improving controlled social cognition and reducing negative symptoms, though results are mixed.

other.title: Sexual Function Enhancement
other.description: Studies demonstrate improvements in libido, arousal, and orgasm intensity in both men and women through central pathways.

other.title: Chronic Pain Management
other.description: Preclinical evidence for analgesic effects through opioid and cannabinoid receptor interactions, though human studies show mixed results.

other.title: Appetite and Metabolism
other.description: Research shows reduced caloric intake and improved metabolic markers, though 8-week RCT did not show weight loss.

convenience.title: Needle-Free Administration
convenience.description: Troches provide convenient option for those averse to nasal sprays or injections

convenience.title: Consistent Dosing
convenience.description: Pre-dosed troches eliminate measurement variability of other routes

limitations.title: Poor Systemic Absorption
limitations.description: Peptide structure does not effectively penetrate skin barrier for brain-targeted effects

limitations.title: Research Focus on Local Effects

latestResearch.title: Oxytocin for Oral Ulcer Healing Through MMP-2/TIMP-2 Pathway
latestResearch.excerpt: Research demonstrates oxytocin accelerates oral ulcer recovery by reducing inflammation and regulating extracellular matrix remodeling, pointing to potential wound healing applications.

latestResearch.excerpt: Study shows oxytocin administration rescues negative impacts of social isolation on wound healing in mice, with treated animals showing faster wound closure and less scar tissue formation.

latestResearch.excerpt: Long-term intranasal oxytocin treatment increases endogenous oxytocin production in children with autism, suggesting potential for sustained benefits beyond acute dosing.

safetyNotes: Must be administered only by qualified healthcare professionals
Requires continuous electronic fetal monitoring during labor
Uterine hyperstimulation is the primary concern - can cause fetal distress
Contraindicated in certain obstetric conditions (see prescribing information)
Water intoxication risk with high doses or prolonged infusion
Have tocolytic agents available for uterine hyperstimulation
stopSigns: Uterine hyperstimulation (contractions too frequent or strong)
Fetal heart rate abnormalities
Signs of uterine rupture
Severe maternal hypertension
Water intoxication symptoms (confusion, seizures)
Severe allergic reaction
oxytocin.descriptionKo: 옥시토신은 시상하부에서 자연적으로 생성되어 뇌하수체 후엽에서 분비되는 9개의 아미노산으로 구성된 펩타이드 호르몬이자 신경펩타이드입니다. "사랑 호르몬" 또는 "결속 호르몬"으로 알려진 이 호르몬은 사회적 유대감, 신뢰, 공감, 성적 재생산, 출산 및 수유에 근본적인 역할을 합니다. 합성 옥시토신(피토신/신토시논)은 분만 유도 및 산후 출혈 조절을 위해 FDA 승인을 받았으며, 비강 내 제제는 자폐증 스펙트럼 장애, 불안, 우울증, PTSD, 만성 통증 및 성기능 장애에 대해 연구되고 있습니다.
oxytocin.keyBenefitsKo: 분만 유도 및 산후 출혈 조절, IV 주입을 통한 정확한 투여, 즉각적인 발병, 산과 환경에서 잘 확립된 안전성 프로필에 대해 FDA 승인
oxytocin.mechanismKo: 자궁 평활근 세포의 옥시토신 수용체(OXTR)에 결합하여 칼슘 유입과 자궁근층 수축을 유발합니다. 또한 프로스타글란딘 방출을 자극하여 자궁 민감도를 향상시킵니다. 분자 정보무게1,007.19 DaLength9 아미노산유형환형 노나펩티드아미노산 순서:Cys-Tyr-Ile-Gln-Asn-Cys-Pro-Leu-Gly-NH2* 순환 구조를 형성하는 Cys1-Cys6 사이의 이황화 다리, C-말단
oxytocin.subtitleKo: 신경하수체 펩타이드 | 사회적 유대감 및 생식 호르몬
safetyNotesKo: 자격을 갖춘 의료 전문가만 투여해야 합니다.
분만 중 지속적인 전자 태아 모니터링이 필요합니다.
자궁의 과잉 자극이 주요 관심사입니다. 태아 조난을 유발할 수 있습니다.
특정 산과 질환에서는 금기입니다(처방 정보 참조).
고용량 또는 장기간 주입 시 물 중독 위험
자궁과다자극에 사용할 수 있는 대장용해제를 가지고 있어야 합니다.
stopSignsKo: 자궁과자극(수축이 너무 빈번하거나 강함)
태아 심박수 이상
자궁 파열의 징후
심한 산모 고혈압
물 중독 증상(혼란, 발작)
심한 알레르기 반응

latestResearchKo.title: Oxytocin for Oral Ulcer Healing Through MMP-2/TIMP-2 Pathway
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Research demonstrates oxytocin accelerates oral ulcer recovery by reducing inflammation and regulating extracellular matrix remodeling, pointing to potential wound healing applications.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: MMP-2/TIMP-2 경로를 통한 구강궤양 치료를 위한 옥시토신
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구에 따르면 옥시토신은 염증을 줄이고 세포외 기질 리모델링을 조절하여 구강 궤양 회복을 가속화하며 잠재적인 상처 치유 응용 가능성을 제시합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Social Isolation, Wound Healing, and Oxytocin Administration
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Study shows oxytocin administration rescues negative impacts of social isolation on wound healing in mice, with treated animals showing faster wound closure and less scar tissue formation.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 사회적 고립, 상처 치유 및 옥시토신 투여
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구에 따르면 옥시토신 투여는 생쥐의 상처 치유에 대한 사회적 고립의 부정적인 영향을 구제했으며, 치료받은 동물은 더 빠른 상처 봉합과 더 적은 흉터 조직 형성을 보여주었습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Chronic Oxytocin Stimulates Oxytocinergic System in Autistic Children
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Long-term intranasal oxytocin treatment increases endogenous oxytocin production in children with autism, suggesting potential for sustained benefits beyond acute dosing.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 만성 옥시토신은 자폐 아동의 옥시토신 시스템을 자극합니다
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 장기간 비강 내 옥시토신 치료는 자폐증 아동의 내인성 옥시토신 생산을 증가시켜 급성 투여 이후에도 지속적인 이점을 얻을 가능성이 있음을 시사합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Oxytocin in Stress-Related Neuropsychiatric Disorders
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Comprehensive review of therapeutic potential for anxiety, depression, and PTSD. Highlights oxytocin's anti-inflammatory, anxiolytic, and antidepressant properties across multiple pathways.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 스트레스 관련 신경정신 질환에서의 옥시토신
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 불안, 우울증 및 PTSD에 대한 치료 가능성에 대한 종합적인 검토. 여러 경로에 걸쳐 옥시토신의 항염증, 항불안제, 항우울제 특성을 강조합니다.

obstetric.title: Labor Induction
obstetric.description: FDA-approved for initiation or augmentation of uterine contractions when vaginal delivery is medically indicated

obstetric.title: Postpartum Hemorrhage Prevention
obstetric.description: FDA-approved for control of postpartum bleeding through uterine contraction stimulation during third stage of labor

obstetric.title: Incomplete Abortion Management
obstetric.description: Adjunctive therapy for management of incomplete or inevitable abortion in second trimester

research.title: Autism Spectrum Disorders (Research)
research.description: Injectable forms used in some research settings, though intranasal is preferred for central effects

research.title: Lactation Support
research.description: Historical use for milk ejection reflex stimulation (intranasal now preferred)

research.title: Limited Clinical Data
research.description: Most oxytocin research uses intranasal route; sublingual formulations have less clinical evidence

research.title: Bioavailability Considerations
research.description: Lower bioavailability (~4.5%) compared to intranasal (~11%) may require higher doses

social.title: Autism Spectrum Disorders
social.description: Extensive research on social cognition improvements, though large trials show mixed results. May benefit specific subpopulations.

social.title: Social Anxiety Disorder
social.description: Studies show decreased amygdala reactivity to social threats and normalized functional connectivity in brain regions involved in social processing.

social.title: Trust and Social Bonding
social.description: Research demonstrates enhanced interpersonal trust, empathy, and in-group bonding following intranasal administration.

mental.title: PTSD Treatment Augmentation
mental.description: Promising results when combined with exposure therapy, showing reduced PTSD and depression symptoms and improved therapeutic alliance.

mental.title: Depression and Anxiety
mental.description: Emerging evidence for anxiolytic and antidepressant effects, particularly in stress-related conditions. Works through cortisol reduction and anti-inflammatory pathways.

mental.title: Schizophrenia Social Deficits
mental.description: Research shows potential for improving controlled social cognition and reducing negative symptoms, though results are mixed.

other.title: Sexual Function Enhancement
other.description: Studies demonstrate improvements in libido, arousal, and orgasm intensity in both men and women through central pathways.

other.title: Chronic Pain Management
other.description: Preclinical evidence for analgesic effects through opioid and cannabinoid receptor interactions, though human studies show mixed results.

other.title: Appetite and Metabolism
other.description: Research shows reduced caloric intake and improved metabolic markers, though 8-week RCT did not show weight loss.

convenience.title: Needle-Free Administration
convenience.description: Troches provide convenient option for those averse to nasal sprays or injections

convenience.title: Consistent Dosing
convenience.description: Pre-dosed troches eliminate measurement variability of other routes

limitations.title: Research Focus on Local Effects
limitations.description: Some studies examine direct wound healing effects rather than systemic delivery

p21.subtitle: CNTF-Derived Neurogenic Peptide | Cognitive Enhancement & NeuroprotectionNasal
p21.descriptionEn: P21 (also known as P021) is a synthetic tetrapeptide derived from the biologically active region of human ciliary neurotrophic factor (CNTF). Featuring an adamantylated glycine modification for enhanced blood-brain barrier penetration and metabolic stability, P21 promotes neurogenesis, enhances synaptic plasticity, and has shown significant cognitive benefits in preclinical models of Alzheimer's disease, traumatic brain injury, and age-related cognitive decline.
p21.keyBenefits: Rapid CNS delivery via olfactory and trigeminal nerve pathways, bypasses hepatic first-pass metabolism, potentially lower doses needed compared to subcutaneous, non-invasive administration. May provide more pronounced acute cognitive effects.
p21.mechanism: Intranasal administration exploits the direct anatomical connection between nasal mucosa and brain via olfactory and trigeminal nerve pathways. This provides rapid CNS delivery while minimizing systemic exposure. P21's lipophilic adamantane modification enhances mucosal absorption and subsequent brain penetration.Molecular InformationWeight578.3 DaLength5 amino acids (with modifications)TypeModifi
p21.protocolTiming: Intranasal P21 provides faster onset than subcutaneous administration. Some researchers prefer this route for acute cognitive demands. The top peptide chemist at Ceretropic insisted on intranasal over subcutaneous for noticeable cognitive enhancement.Peptide InteractionsAdamaxSynergisticSemaxCompati

interactions.name: Adamax
interactions.description: Adamax incorporates adamantyl portion from P21, may complement cognitive benefits through different neuropeptide pathways

interactions.name: Semax
interactions.description: Both are neuropeptides with established nootropic effects. Different mechanisms (CNTF vs melanocortin) may provide complementary cognitive benefits

interactions.name: Selank
interactions.description: Complementary cognitive and anxiolytic effects through different receptor systems

interactions.name: Dihexa
interactions.description: Both affect neuroplasticity strongly through different pathways (CNTF/BDNF vs HGF/c-Met) - avoid concurrent use without careful cycling

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: Different mechanisms - P21 targets neurogenesis/cognition, BPC-157 focuses on tissue repair and gut-brain axis

interactions.name: Cerebrolysin
interactions.description: P21 was developed as a defined alternative to Cerebrolysin. Both promote neurogenesis but P21 has defined structure and better BBB penetration

interactions.name: NAD+
interactions.description: Complementary mechanisms - NAD+ supports cellular energy metabolism while P21 promotes neurogenesis and synaptic plasticity

interactions.name: Epitalon
interactions.description: Different mechanisms - Epitalon targets telomerase/pineal function while P21 focuses on neurogenesis and cognitive enhancement

qualityGood: Clear Nasal SolutionReconstituted P21 for nasal use should be crystal clear with no particles or clo
Proper Spray MechanismNasal spray bottle should deliver consistent, metered doses with each actuatio
Certificate of AnalysisSource peptide should have third-party testing showing high purity.!Dilution
qualityBad: Cloudy or Discolored SolutionAny cloudiness, particles, or discoloration indicates degradation or co
Inconsistent SprayMalfunctioning spray mechanism prevents accurate dosing.
effectsTimeline: Hours: Potential acute cognitive enhancementWeek 1
2: Cumulative cognitive improvementsWeek 2
4: Enhanced memory and focusWeek 4
6: Full neuroplasticity benefitsNote: P21 has highly cumulative effects
low, slow dosing is recommended
sideEffects: ⚠️ 인간 임상 데이터 전무 — 전임상 단계

quickStart.frequency: 1-2x dailyWhere to ApplyN/A - Intranasal spray
quickStart.bestTiming: Morning or as needed for acute effects
quickStart.effectsTimeline: Minutes to hours for acute effects, weeks for sustained benefits
quickStart.storageNote: Fridge 2-8°C, use within 14-21 days

cognitive.title: Acute Cognitive Enhancement
cognitive.description: Intranasal route may provide faster onset of cognitive effects compared to subcutaneous administration due to direct CNS delivery.

cognitive.title: Focus and Mental Clarity
cognitive.description: Users report enhanced focus, mental clarity, and sustained attention with intranasal P21 administration.

cognitive.title: Memory Support
cognitive.description: Enhanced memory consolidation and recall through direct hippocampal access via nasal route.

cognitive.title: Memory Enhancement
cognitive.description: Preclinical studies demonstrate significant improvements in short-term memory, spatial reference memory, and object recognition tasks in normal adult mice and aged rats.

cognitive.title: Learning Acceleration
cognitive.description: P21 treatment accelerated spatial learning in water maze tasks, with treated animals showing faster acquisition of platform location encoding.

cognitive.title: Neurogenesis Promotion
cognitive.description: Enhanced proliferation and maturation of newborn neurons in the hippocampal dentate gyrus, increasing the pool of functional neurons for memory networks.

neuroprotective.title: Direct CNS Delivery
neuroprotective.description: Intranasal route delivers P21 more directly to brain tissue, potentially enhancing neuroprotective effects in targeted regions.

neuroprotective.title: Neurogenesis Support
neuroprotective.description: May provide efficient delivery for ongoing neurogenesis enhancement in the hippocampal dentate gyrus.

neuroprotective.title: Synaptic Protection
neuroprotective.description: Direct CNS access may enhance P21's ability to upregulate synaptic proteins and support neuronal health.

neuroprotective.title: Alzheimer's Disease
neuroprotective.description: In 3xTg-AD mice, P21 significantly reduced tau hyperphosphorylation, prevented neurodegeneration, and rescued cognitive deficits when administered long-term.

neuroprotective.title: Traumatic Brain Injury
neuroprotective.description: Enhanced neurogenesis by 80%, reversed dendritic and synaptic density loss, and improved memory recall in controlled cortical impact TBI models.

neuroprotective.title: Age-Related Cognitive Decline
neuroprotective.description: Restored neurogenesis to levels approaching young adults in aged rats (18-24 months), with normalized synaptic protein levels and improved BDNF/TrkB signaling.

mood.title: Rapid Mood Effects
mood.description: Faster onset of BDNF-mediated mood support may be achieved through intranasal delivery.

mood.title: Anxiety Reduction
mood.description: Similar anxiolytic effects as subcutaneous route, potentially with faster onset.

mood.title: Emotional Resilience
mood.description: Enhanced neuroplasticity through direct CNS delivery may support emotional regulation.

mood.title: BDNF-Mediated Mood Support
mood.description: Increased BDNF expression may support mood regulation, as BDNF is implicated in depression and anxiety disorders.

mood.title: Stress Resilience
mood.description: Enhanced neuroplasticity and synaptic function may improve stress response and emotional regulation.

latestResearch.title: P021 in CDKL5 Deficiency Disorder - Mixed Results
latestResearch.excerpt: Study examining P021 in CDKL5 deficiency showed excellent in vitro restoration of neuronal deficits but limited in vivo efficacy, highlighting importance of disease-specific validation.

latestResearch.title: Comprehensive P021 Review - Alzheimer's Disease Therapeutic Opportunity
latestResearch.excerpt: Review establishing P021 as a promising disease-modifying compound for Alzheimer's, with favorable pharmacokinetics (>3h plasma half-life), oral bioavailability, and absence of adverse effects in long-term studies.

latestResearch.title: Cognitive Vitality Assessment of P021
latestResearch.excerpt: Expert assessment noting P021's preclinical efficacy in Alzheimer's models, mechanism via BDNF/TrkB/GSK3β pathway, and current clinical development status with Phanes Biotech.

latestResearch.title: P021 for Prevention of Cognitive Impairment
latestResearch.excerpt: Research demonstrating P021 can prevent synaptic deficits and cognitive impairment when treatment is initiated during early disease stages, suggesting potential for preventive therapy.

safetyNotes: Use sterile nasal spray equipment
Clear nasal passages before administration
May cause temporary nasal irritation
CRITICAL: No human clinical trials have been conducted
Start with lower doses to assess tolerance
Consult healthcare provider before use
All benefits are based on preclinical and anecdotal data
stopSigns: Persistent nasal irritation or nosebleeds
Severe headaches
Unusual neurological symptoms
Significant mood changes
Any concerning symptoms
p21.descriptionKo: P21(P021로도 알려짐)은 인간 섬모 신경영양 인자(CNTF)의 생물학적 활성 영역에서 유래된 합성 테트라펩타이드입니다. 강화된 뇌혈관 장벽 침투 및 대사 안정성을 위한 아다만틸화 글리신 변형을 특징으로 하는 P21은 신경 발생을 촉진하고 시냅스 가소성을 강화하며 알츠하이머병, 외상성 뇌 손상 및 연령 관련 인지 저하의 전임상 모델에서 상당한 인지적 이점을 보여주었습니다.
p21.keyBenefitsKo: 후각 및 삼차신경 경로를 통한 신속한 CNS 전달은 간의 초회 통과 대사를 우회하므로 피하 비침습적 투여에 비해 잠재적으로 더 낮은 용량이 필요합니다. 보다 뚜렷한 급성 인지 효과를 제공할 수 있습니다.
p21.mechanismKo: 비강내 투여는 후각 및 삼차신경 경로를 통해 코 점막과 뇌 사이의 직접적인 해부학적 연결을 이용합니다. 이는 전신 노출을 최소화하면서 신속한 CNS 전달을 제공합니다. P21의 친유성 아다만탄 변형은 점막 흡수 및 그에 따른 뇌 침투를 향상시킵니다.분자 정보무게578.3 DaLength5 아미노산(변형 있음)유형수정
p21.subtitleKo: CNTF 유래 신경성 펩타이드 | 인지 향상 및 신경 보호코
safetyNotesKo: 멸균된 비강 스프레이 장비를 사용하세요.
투여 전 비강을 깨끗하게 하십시오.
일시적인 코 자극을 일으킬 수 있음
중요: 인간을 대상으로 한 임상 시험은 수행되지 않았습니다.
내성을 평가하려면 더 낮은 용량으로 시작하세요.
사용하기 전에 의료 서비스 제공자와 상담하세요
모든 혜택은 전임상 및 일화 데이터를 기반으로 합니다.
stopSignsKo: 지속적인 코 자극 또는 코피
심한 두통
특이한 신경학적 증상
상당한 기분 변화
모든 관련 증상

latestResearchKo.title: P021 in CDKL5 Deficiency Disorder - Mixed Results
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Study examining P021 in CDKL5 deficiency showed excellent in vitro restoration of neuronal deficits but limited in vivo efficacy, highlighting importance of disease-specific validation.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: CDKL5 결핍 장애의 P021 - 혼합된 결과
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: CDKL5 결핍에서 P021을 조사한 연구에서는 신경 결손의 시험관 내 복원이 탁월했지만 생체 내 효능이 제한되어 질병 특이적 검증의 중요성이 강조되었습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Comprehensive P021 Review - Alzheimer's Disease Therapeutic Opportunity
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Review establishing P021 as a promising disease-modifying compound for Alzheimer's, with favorable pharmacokinetics (>3h plasma half-life), oral bioavailability, and absence of adverse effects in long-term studies.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 종합적인 P021 검토 - 알츠하이머병 치료 기회
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: P021을 유리한 약동학(>3시간 혈장 반감기), 경구 생체 이용률 및 장기간 연구에서 부작용이 없는 유망한 알츠하이머병 치료 화합물로 확립하는 것을 검토합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Cognitive Vitality Assessment of P021
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Expert assessment noting P021's preclinical efficacy in Alzheimer's models, mechanism via BDNF/TrkB/GSK3β pathway, and current clinical development status with Phanes Biotech.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: P021의 인지 활력 평가
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 알츠하이머 모델에서 P021의 전임상 효능, BDNF/TrkB/GSK3β 경로를 통한 메커니즘, Phanes Biotech의 현재 임상 개발 상태를 지적하는 전문가 평가.

latestResearchKo.title: P021 for Prevention of Cognitive Impairment
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Research demonstrating P021 can prevent synaptic deficits and cognitive impairment when treatment is initiated during early disease stages, suggesting potential for preventive therapy.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 인지장애 예방을 위한 P021
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: P021을 입증하는 연구는 초기 질병 단계에서 치료가 시작될 때 시냅스 결핍과 인지 장애를 예방할 수 있어 예방 요법의 가능성을 시사합니다.

neuroprotective.title: Traumatic Brain Injury
neuroprotective.description: Enhanced neurogenesis by 80%, reversed dendritic and synaptic density loss, and improved memory recall in controlled cortical impact TBI models.

neuroprotective.title: Age-Related Cognitive Decline
neuroprotective.description: Restored neurogenesis to levels approaching young adults in aged rats (18-24 months), with normalized synaptic protein levels and improved BDNF/TrkB signaling.

mood.title: Rapid Mood Effects
mood.description: Faster onset of BDNF-mediated mood support may be achieved through intranasal delivery.

mood.title: Anxiety Reduction
mood.description: Similar anxiolytic effects as subcutaneous route, potentially with faster onset.

mood.title: Emotional Resilience
mood.description: Enhanced neuroplasticity through direct CNS delivery may support emotional regulation.

mood.title: BDNF-Mediated Mood Support
mood.description: Increased BDNF expression may support mood regulation, as BDNF is implicated in depression and anxiety disorders.

mood.title: Stress Resilience
mood.description: Enhanced neuroplasticity and synaptic function may improve stress response and emotional regulation.

pe-22-28.subtitle: TREK-1 Channel Blocker | Shortened Spadin AnalogNasal
pe-22-28.descriptionEn: PE-22-28, also known as Mini-Spadin, is a synthetic heptapeptide derived from positions 22-28 of the parent peptide Spadin. Spadin itself originates from the propeptide (PE) released during the maturation of sortilin/neurotensin receptor-3 (NTSR3). PE-22-28 is a potent and selective antagonist of TREK-1 (TWIK-Related Potassium Channel-1), a two-pore domain potassium channel implicated in depression, neuroprotection, and pain modulation. With an IC50 of 0.12 nM, PE-22-28 demonstrates approximately 300-500 fold greater affinity for TREK-1 compared to full-length Spadin. Preclinical research show
pe-22-28.keyBenefits: Rapid antidepressant-like effects (4 days in preclinical models), hippocampal neurogenesis, synaptogenesis (PSD-95 increase), CREB activation, enhanced serotonergic neurotransmission, potential neuroprotection, extended duration of action (~23 hours)
pe-22-28.mechanism: PE-22-28 selectively blocks TREK-1 potassium channels with IC50 of 0.12 nM. TREK-1 inhibition increases neuronal excitability in the dorsal raphe nucleus, enhancing serotonin (5-HT) firing rate and neurotransmission. This triggers downstream CREB phosphorylation, BDNF expression, and hippocampal neurogenesis. Unlike SSRIs that take weeks, these effects manifest within 4 days in animal models.Molec
pe-22-28.protocolTiming: PE-22-28 has ~23 hour duration of action in animal studies, supporting once-daily administration. Morning dosing is common but specific timing may not be critical.Peptide InteractionsSSRIs (Fluoxetine, Sertraline)Monitor CombinationSemax / NA-SemaxPotentially SynergisticSelankSynergisticDihexaPotent

interactions.name: SSRIs (Fluoxetine, Sertraline)
interactions.description: Both target serotonergic pathways via different mechanisms. Fluoxetine also weakly inhibits TREK-1. Theoretical additive effects - monitor for excessive serotonergic activity

interactions.name: Semax / NA-Semax
interactions.description: Both support neurogenesis and cognitive function via different mechanisms. Semax acts through BDNF/NGF; PE-22-28 via TREK-1 inhibition. Complementary nootropic stack

interactions.name: Selank
interactions.description: Both have anxiolytic and neuroprotective properties. Selank modulates GABA; PE-22-28 blocks TREK-1 potassium channels. Different mechanisms for anxiety/mood support

interactions.name: Dihexa
interactions.description: Both promote neurogenesis and synaptic plasticity through different pathways. Dihexa acts via HGF/c-Met; PE-22-28 via TREK-1/5-HT enhancement. Complementary neuroplasticity targets

interactions.name: Cerebrolysin
interactions.description: Both support neuroplasticity and neuroprotection. Cerebrolysin provides neurotrophic factors; PE-22-28 enhances 5-HT transmission and neurogenesis via TREK-1 blockade

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: BPC-157 has shown neuroprotective effects and dopamine system modulation. Different mechanisms from PE-22-28's TREK-1 action. No contraindications identified

interactions.name: Potassium Channel Modulators
interactions.description: Other drugs affecting potassium channels could have additive or antagonistic effects. PE-22-28 is selective for TREK-1 but caution warranted with K+ channel drugs

interactions.name: MAOIs
interactions.description: PE-22-28 increases serotonergic neurotransmission. Combining with MAOIs could theoretically increase serotonin syndrome risk. No clinical data - avoid combination

quickStart.effectsTimeline: Days 1-4: Preclinical models show measurable antidepressant effects by day 4; Weeks 1-2: Neurogenesis and synaptogenesis
