mood.title: Depression Research
mood.description: Primary research focus. Preclinical studies show rapid antidepressant effects in forced swim test, tail suspension test, learned helplessness, and novelty-suppressed feeding models. Acts faster than SSRIs with 4-day efficacy window

mood.title: Neurogenesis Enhancement
mood.description: PE-22-28 nearly doubles hippocampal BrdU-positive (newborn) cells after 4-day treatment. 85% of new cells are neuronal precursors (DCX-positive), indicating genuine neuroplasticity

cognitive.title: Cognitive Function / Memory
cognitive.description: TREK-1 is highly expressed in hippocampus and prefrontal cortex. CREB activation supports memory formation. Research interest in Alzheimer's disease and age-related cognitive decline

anxiety.title: Anxiety Research
anxiety.description: TREK-1 knockout mice show reduced anxiety in elevated plus maze. Spadin and analogs demonstrate anxiolytic properties alongside antidepressant effects in preclinical models

neuroprotection.title: Neuroprotection / Stroke
neuroprotection.description: Research suggests PE-22-28 may reduce neuronal apoptosis in ischemic models. TREK-1 modulation affects neuronal survival under stress conditions

limitations.title: Limited Oral Data
limitations.description: Only one preclinical study tested oral administration (1 mg/kg via gavage in mice). Human oral bioavailability unknown

limitations.title: Peptide Degradation Concerns
limitations.description: As a peptide, PE-22-28 is susceptible to digestive enzyme degradation. The extent of oral absorption in humans is not established

limitations.title: Higher Doses Required
limitations.description: Oral dosing in mice (1 mg/kg) was substantially higher than IP dosing (3-4 mcg/kg), suggesting lower oral bioavailability

limitations.title: No Topical Research
limitations.description: PE-22-28 has not been studied for topical application. All research uses injectable or oral routes

limitations.title: CNS Target Requires Systemic Delivery
limitations.description: TREK-1 channels in the brain require systemic absorption and blood-brain barrier penetration - not achievable topically

limitations.title: No Direct PE-22-28 Nasal Studies
limitations.description: While intranasal delivery is used for similar neuropeptides (Semax, Selank), PE-22-28 has not been specifically studied via this route

limitations.title: Theoretical Basis Only
limitations.description: The small size (773 Da) suggests potential for nasal absorption, but bioavailability and optimal dosing are unknown

limitations.title: Formulation Considerations
limitations.description: Optimal nasal formulation (pH, absorption enhancers, volume) has not been developed for PE-22-28

latestResearch.title: TREK-1 Inhibition and A1 Astrocyte Reactivity in Depression
latestResearch.excerpt: Recent research shows TREK-1 blockade inhibits activation of A1-like reactive astrocytes via NF-κB signaling pathway, identifying a novel cellular mechanism for antidepressant action beyond neuronal effects.

latestResearch.title: PE-22-28 Demonstrates Extended Duration of Action
latestResearch.excerpt: Studies confirm PE-22-28 maintains antidepressant activity for up to 23 hours per dose, compared to 7 hours for parent compound Spadin, making it more suitable for once-daily research protocols.

latestResearch.title: Neurogenesis and Synaptogenesis Within 4 Days
latestResearch.excerpt: PE-22-28 and analogs consistently demonstrate rapid hippocampal neurogenesis (BrdU+ cells nearly double) and synaptogenesis (increased PSD-95) within 4 days - substantially faster than any conventional antidepressant.

latestResearch.title: Human Genetic Studies Support TREK-1 Target
latestResearch.excerpt: Variation in TREK1 gene (KCNK2) associated with depression-resistant phenotype in humans shows potentiated neural responses to rewards, providing translational validation for TREK-1 as therapeutic target.

safetyNotes: NOT FDA-approved - research compound only with no human clinical trials
All safety data is from preclinical (animal) studies
Preclinical studies show no effects on TREK-2, TRAAK, TASK-1, TRESK, or cardiac hERG channels - suggests cardiac safety
Animal studies showed no pain hypersensitivity, seizures, or cardiac dysfunction
Spadin showed no effects on sleep-wake cycle or memory at tested doses in rats
Theoretical serotonin syndrome risk if combined with MAOIs or high-dose SSRIs - avoid combination
Long-term safety in humans completely unknown
Not recommended during pregnancy or breastfeeding (no safety data)
May affect other undiscovered targets - exercise caution
Start with lowest effective dose; do not exceed research protocol ranges
stopSigns: Any signs of serotonin syndrome: agitation, confusion, rapid heart rate, high blood pressure, muscle twitching
Severe or persistent headaches
Seizure activity or unusual neurological symptoms
Cardiac symptoms: palpitations, chest pain, irregular heartbeat
Allergic reaction: rash, hives, difficulty breathing, swelling
Severe mood changes: worsening depression, suicidal thoughts, mania
Unusual bleeding or bruising
Any unexpected adverse effects - discontinue and seek medical attention
pe-22-28.descriptionKo: Mini-Spadin으로도 알려진 PE-22-28은 모 펩타이드 Spadin의 위치 22-28에서 파생된 합성 헵타펩타이드입니다. Spadin 자체는 소르틸린/뉴로텐신 수용체-3(NTSR3)이 성숙되는 동안 방출되는 프로펩타이드(PE)에서 유래합니다. PE-22-28은 우울증, 신경 보호 및 통증 조절과 관련된 2공 도메인 칼륨 채널인 TREK-1(TWIK 관련 칼륨 채널-1)의 강력하고 선택적인 길항제입니다. IC50이 0.12nM인 PE-22-28은 전체 길이의 Spadin에 비해 TREK-1에 대해 약 300-500배 더 큰 친화성을 보여줍니다. 전임상 연구 쇼
pe-22-28.keyBenefitsKo: 신속한 항우울제 유사 효과(전임상 모델에서 4일), 해마 신경 발생, 시냅스 발생(PSD-95 증가), CREB 활성화, 세로토닌성 신경 전달 강화, 잠재적 신경 보호, 작용 지속 시간 연장(~23시간)
pe-22-28.mechanismKo: PE-22-28은 IC50이 0.12nM인 TREK-1 칼륨 채널을 선택적으로 차단합니다. TREK-1 억제는 등쪽 솔기 핵의 신경 흥분성을 증가시켜 세로토닌(5-HT) 발사 속도와 신경 전달을 향상시킵니다. 이는 하류 CREB 인산화, BDNF 발현 및 해마 신경 발생을 유발합니다. 몇 주가 걸리는 SSRI와 달리 이러한 효과는 동물 모델에서 4일 이내에 나타납니다.Molec
pe-22-28.subtitleKo: TREK-1 채널 차단기 | 단축된 Spadin AnalogNasal
safetyNotesKo: FDA 승인 없음 - 인체 임상 시험 없이 연구 화합물만 사용
모든 안전성 데이터는 전임상(동물) 연구에서 나온 것입니다.
전임상 연구에서는 TREK-2, TRAAK, TASK-1, TRESK 또는 심장 hERG 채널에 영향을 미치지 않는 것으로 나타났습니다. - 심장 안전성을 시사합니다.
동물 연구에서는 통증 과민증, 발작 또는 심장 기능 장애가 나타나지 않았습니다.
Spadin은 쥐를 대상으로 테스트한 용량에서 수면-각성 주기 또는 기억에 아무런 영향을 미치지 않는 것으로 나타났습니다.
MAOI 또는 고용량 SSRI와 병용할 경우 이론적 세로토닌 증후군 위험 - 병용 금지
인간에 대한 장기적인 안전성은 완전히 알려지지 않았습니다.
임신 또는 모유 수유 중에는 권장되지 않음(안전성 데이터 없음)
발견되지 않은 다른 대상에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 주의하세요.
가장 낮은 유효 용량으로 시작하십시오. 연구 프로토콜 범위를 초과하지 마십시오
stopSignsKo: 세로토닌 증후군의 징후: 초조, 혼란, 빠른 심박수, 고혈압, 근육 경련
심각하거나 지속적인 두통
발작 활동 또는 비정상적인 신경학적 증상
심장 증상 : 심계항진, 흉통, 불규칙한 심장 박동
알레르기 반응: 발진, 두드러기, 호흡곤란, 부기
심각한 기분 변화: 우울증 악화, 자살 충동, 조증
비정상적인 출혈이나 타박상
예상치 못한 부작용 - 중단하고 의사의 진료를 받으십시오.

latestResearchKo.title: TREK-1 Inhibition and A1 Astrocyte Reactivity in Depression
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Recent research shows TREK-1 blockade inhibits activation of A1-like reactive astrocytes via NF-κB signaling pathway, identifying a novel cellular mechanism for antidepressant action beyond neuronal effects.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 우울증에서의 TREK-1 억제 및 A1 성상교세포 반응성
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 최근 연구에 따르면 TREK-1 차단은 NF-κB 신호 전달 경로를 통해 A1 유사 반응성 성상교세포의 활성화를 억제하여 신경 효과를 넘어서는 항우울제 작용에 대한 새로운 세포 메커니즘을 확인합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: PE-22-28 Demonstrates Extended Duration of Action
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Studies confirm PE-22-28 maintains antidepressant activity for up to 23 hours per dose, compared to 7 hours for parent compound Spadin, making it more suitable for once-daily research protocols.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: PE-22-28은 확장된 활동 기간을 보여줍니다.
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구에 따르면 PE-22-28은 모화합물 Spadin의 7시간에 비해 복용량당 최대 23시간 동안 항우울제 활성을 유지하므로 1일 1회 연구 프로토콜에 더 적합합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Neurogenesis and Synaptogenesis Within 4 Days
latestResearchKo.excerpt: PE-22-28 and analogs consistently demonstrate rapid hippocampal neurogenesis (BrdU+ cells nearly double) and synaptogenesis (increased PSD-95) within 4 days - substantially faster than any conventional antidepressant.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 4일 이내에 신경발생과 시냅스발생
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: PE-22-28 및 유사체는 4일 이내에 빠른 해마 신경 생성(BrdU+ 세포 거의 두 배) 및 시냅스 생성(PSD-95 증가)을 일관되게 나타냅니다. 이는 기존 항우울제보다 훨씬 빠릅니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Human Genetic Studies Support TREK-1 Target
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Variation in TREK1 gene (KCNK2) associated with depression-resistant phenotype in humans shows potentiated neural responses to rewards, providing translational validation for TREK-1 as therapeutic target.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 인간 유전 연구는 TREK-1 표적을 지원합니다
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 인간의 우울증 저항성 표현형과 관련된 TREK1 유전자(KCNK2)의 변이는 보상에 대한 신경 반응이 강화되어 치료 표적으로 TREK-1에 대한 번역 검증을 제공합니다.

peg-mgf.subtitle: Pegylated Mechano Growth Factor | IGF-1 Splice Variant
peg-mgf.descriptionEn: PEG-MGF (Pegylated Mechano Growth Factor) is a modified form of the IGF-1 splice variant MGF (IGF-1Ec), with polyethylene glycol attached to extend its half-life from minutes to hours. MGF is naturally expressed in muscle tissue following mechanical stress or injury, where it activates satellite cells to support muscle repair. A landmark 2011 human cell study (cited 74+ times) showed MGF significantly increased satellite cell proliferation at doses as low as 3ng/ml, with effects on proliferative lifespan in young but not elderly donors. While in vitro and animal studies show promise for muscle
peg-mgf.keyBenefits: Extended half-life (hours vs minutes for unmodified MGF) through PEGylation. Activates satellite cells for muscle repair and regeneration. May support recovery from mechanical stress or injury.
peg-mgf.mechanism: PEG-MGF activates muscle satellite (stem) cells by binding to specific receptors, stimulating the MAPK/ERK signaling pathway. This enhances protein synthesis and promotes muscle fiber repair. The E-peptide domain appears to have distinct activity from mature IGF-1.Molecular InformationWeight~2,888 Da (MGF-24aa E-peptide)Length24 amino acids (C-terminal E-peptide)TypeIGF-1Ec splice variant C-termin
peg-mgf.protocolTiming: Post-workout administration may align with natural MGF upregulation patterns. For localized effects, inject bilaterally into or near target muscles.Peptide InteractionsIGF-1 LR3Use CautionHuman Growth HormoneMonitor CombinationBPC-157SynergisticTB-500SynergisticCJC-1295/IpamorelinMonitor Combination

interactions.name: IGF-1 LR3
interactions.description: Both target IGF-1 pathways. Combining may cause receptor overstimulation. If used together, reduce doses of each significantly.

interactions.name: Human Growth Hormone
interactions.description: HGH increases endogenous IGF-1/MGF. Combined use may amplify effects but also risks. Monitor for excessive water retention and joint pain.

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: Complementary healing mechanisms. BPC-157 promotes angiogenesis while PEG-MGF activates satellite cells. Popular recovery stack.

interactions.name: TB-500
interactions.description: Commonly combined for injury recovery. TB-500 promotes cell migration and reduces inflammation while PEG-MGF activates muscle stem cells.

interactions.name: CJC-1295/Ipamorelin
interactions.description: GH secretagogues increase endogenous GH/IGF-1 axis activity. May enhance PEG-MGF effects but monitor for synergistic side effects.

interactions.name: MK-677
interactions.description: MK-677 elevates IGF-1 levels chronically. Combined use may provide additive growth effects but increases risk of receptor desensitization.

interactions.name: Insulin
interactions.description: Both affect glucose metabolism. PEG-MGF may have insulin-like effects. Monitor blood sugar carefully if combined.

interactions.name: Thymosin Beta-4
interactions.description: TB-4 and PEG-MGF work through different regenerative pathways. Combination may enhance tissue repair through multiple mechanisms.

muscleRepair.title: Satellite Cell Activation
muscleRepair.description: Primary mechanism - activates dormant muscle satellite cells, which fuse to damaged muscle fibers to aid repair and regeneration.

muscleRepair.title: Delayed Senescence
muscleRepair.description: Human cell studies show MGF E-peptide increases proliferative lifespan and delays senescence in muscle progenitor cells from younger donors.

muscleRepair.title: Enhanced Fusion Potential
muscleRepair.description: Research demonstrates increased fusion potential of activated satellite cells, supporting muscle fiber repair and potential hypertrophy.

tissueRegeneration.title: Tendon Healing
tissueRegeneration.description: Animal studies suggest PEG-MGF may improve healing outcomes in tendon injuries, including Achilles tendon models.

tissueRegeneration.title: Bone Regeneration
tissueRegeneration.description: Rabbit models showed faster bone healing with PEG-MGF through regulation of osteoblast activity.

tissueRegeneration.title: Cartilage Repair
tissueRegeneration.description: Research indicates potential for articular cartilage repair in joint injury models.

recovery.title: Exercise Recovery
recovery.description: MGF is naturally upregulated following mechanical stress/exercise. Supplementation may enhance natural recovery processes.

recovery.title: Injury Recovery
recovery.description: Localized administration near injury sites may support targeted tissue repair through satellite cell recruitment.

recovery.title: Anti-Inflammatory Modulation
recovery.description: MGF overexpression studies show modulation of inflammatory cytokines and enhanced macrophage resolution during recovery.

neuroprotection.title: Oxidative Stress Protection
neuroprotection.description: Research shows MGF protects against oxygen free radical damage in neuronal tissue, suggesting antioxidant properties.

neuroprotection.title: Neuronal Repair & Adaptation
neuroprotection.description: Studies indicate MGF has special functions in damage, repair and adaptation in neuronal tissue beyond its muscle effects.

neuroprotection.title: Cell Transplantation Enhancement
neuroprotection.description: MGF-24aa-E peptide improves human precursor cell transplantation and in vivo cell migration, potentially enhancing cell-based therapies.

latestResearch.title: MGF Review: Cog or Loose Screw in Repair Machinery?
latestResearch.excerpt: Comprehensive scientific review examining MGF mechanisms and controversies. Notes that while synthetically manufactured MGF peptide shows activity, no analogous peptide product has been isolated from cultured cells or in vivo.

latestResearch.title: MGF Minireview: Tissue Repair and Regeneration
latestResearch.excerpt: Overview of MGF as a putative IGF-I gene expression product involved in tissue repair. Highlights MGF upregulation following exercise and injury, with potential to activate satellite cells and recruit macrophages.

latestResearch.title: PEG-MGF Emerging Research Applications
latestResearch.excerpt: Research indicates PEG-MGF demonstrates potential applications beyond muscle growth, including bone recovery, cartilage protection, wound healing, and neuroprotection.

latestResearch.title: Satellite Cell Activation Studies
latestResearch.excerpt: Research from Journal of Cellular Physiology suggests MGF can significantly increase satellite cell activation, with PEG-MGF offering extended therapeutic window due to pegylation.

safetyNotes: Not FDA-approved - research chemical only with limited human safety data
Contraindicated with any history of cancer or neoplastic disease
Discontinue if any unusual growths, lumps, or tissue changes occur
Long-term safety profile is unknown
May affect blood glucose - monitor if diabetic or pre-diabetic
Not recommended during pregnancy or breastfeeding
Prohibited in competitive sports (WADA banned substance)
Age-dependent response: Human cell studies showed proliferative benefits in young (≤15yr) but NOT elderly (73yr) satellite cells
May deplete reserve cell population - hypertrophy was associated with decreased reserve cells in studies
stopSigns: Any unusual growths, lumps, or rapid tissue changes
Severe injection site reactions beyond normal soreness
Persistent headaches or vision changes
Signs of hypoglycemia (shakiness, confusion, sweating)
Unexpected swelling or edema
Any symptoms suggesting abnormal growth stimulation
peg-mgf.descriptionKo: PEG-MGF(Pegylated Mechano Growth Factor)는 IGF-1 스플라이스 변형 MGF(IGF-1Ec)의 변형된 형태로 폴리에틸렌 글리콜이 부착되어 반감기가 몇 분에서 몇 시간으로 연장됩니다. MGF는 기계적 스트레스나 부상 후 근육 조직에서 자연적으로 발현되며, 위성 세포를 활성화하여 근육 복구를 지원합니다. 획기적인 2011년 인간 세포 연구(74회 이상 인용)에서는 MGF가 3ng/ml의 낮은 용량에서도 위성 세포 증식을 크게 증가시켰으며, 젊은 기증자의 증식 수명에 영향을 미치지만 노인 기증자는 그렇지 않은 것으로 나타났습니다. 체외 및 동물 연구에서 근육에 대한 가능성이 밝혀졌지만
peg-mgf.keyBenefitsKo: PEG화를 통해 반감기 연장(수정되지 않은 MGF의 경우 시간 대 분). 근육 복구 및 재생을 위해 위성 세포를 활성화합니다. 기계적 스트레스나 부상으로부터의 회복을 지원할 수 있습니다.
peg-mgf.mechanismKo: PEG-MGF는 특정 수용체에 결합하여 MAPK/ERK 신호 전달 경로를 자극함으로써 근육 위성(줄기) 세포를 활성화합니다. 이는 단백질 합성을 향상시키고 근육 섬유 복구를 촉진합니다. E-펩티드 도메인은 성숙한 IGF-1과 별개의 활성을 갖는 것으로 보입니다. 분자 정보무게~2,888 Da(MGF-24aa E-펩티드)길이24개 아미노산(C-말단 E-펩티드)유형IGF-1Ec 스플라이스 변형 C-말단
peg-mgf.subtitleKo: Pegylated Mechano 성장 인자 | IGF-1 스플라이스 변형
safetyNotesKo: FDA 승인 없음 - 인체 안전 데이터가 제한적인 연구용 화학물질
암이나 종양성 질환의 병력이 있는 경우 금기
비정상적인 성장, 덩어리 또는 조직 변화가 발생하면 중단하십시오.
장기적인 안전성 프로필은 알려져 있지 않습니다.
혈당에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 당뇨병이 있는지, 당뇨병 전단계인지 모니터링하세요.
임신이나 모유 수유 중에는 권장하지 않음
경쟁 스포츠에서 금지됨(WADA 금지 약물)
연령 의존적 반응: 인간 세포 연구에서는 젊은(15세 이하) 위성 세포에서는 증식 이점이 나타났지만 노인(73세) 위성 세포에서는 그렇지 않은 것으로 나타났습니다.
예비 세포 집단을 고갈시킬 수 있습니다. 연구에서 비대는 예비 세포 감소와 관련이 있었습니다.
stopSignsKo: 비정상적인 성장, 덩어리 또는 급격한 조직 변화
정상적인 통증을 넘어서는 심각한 주사 부위 반응
지속적인 두통이나 시력 변화
저혈당 징후(떨림, 혼란, 발한)
예상치 못한 부종이나 부종
비정상적인 성장 자극을 시사하는 모든 증상

latestResearchKo.title: MGF Review: Cog or Loose Screw in Repair Machinery?
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Comprehensive scientific review examining MGF mechanisms and controversies. Notes that while synthetically manufactured MGF peptide shows activity, no analogous peptide product has been isolated from cultured cells or in vivo.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: MGF 검토: 수리 기계의 톱니바퀴 또는 느슨한 나사?
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: MGF 메커니즘과 논쟁을 조사하는 포괄적인 과학적 검토입니다. 합성적으로 제조된 MGF 펩타이드는 활성을 나타내지만 유사한 펩타이드 제품은 배양된 세포 또는 생체 내에서 분리되지 않았습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: MGF Minireview: Tissue Repair and Regeneration
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Overview of MGF as a putative IGF-I gene expression product involved in tissue repair. Highlights MGF upregulation following exercise and injury, with potential to activate satellite cells and recruit macrophages.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: MGF Minireview: 조직 복구 및 재생
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 조직 복구에 관여하는 추정 IGF-I 유전자 발현 산물인 MGF의 개요. 위성 세포를 활성화하고 대식세포를 모집할 가능성이 있는 운동 및 부상 후 MGF 상향 조절을 강조합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: PEG-MGF Emerging Research Applications
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Research indicates PEG-MGF demonstrates potential applications beyond muscle growth, including bone recovery, cartilage protection, wound healing, and neuroprotection.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: PEG-MGF 신흥 연구 애플리케이션
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구에 따르면 PEG-MGF는 뼈 회복, 연골 보호, 상처 치유 및 신경 보호를 포함하여 근육 성장 이상의 잠재적 응용 분야를 보여줍니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Satellite Cell Activation Studies
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Research from Journal of Cellular Physiology suggests MGF can significantly increase satellite cell activation, with PEG-MGF offering extended therapeutic window due to pegylation.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 위성 셀 활성화 연구
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: Journal of Cellular Physiology의 연구에 따르면 MGF는 위성 세포 활성화를 크게 증가시킬 수 있으며 PEG-MGF는 페길화로 인해 확장된 치료 범위를 제공합니다.

muscleRepair.title: Satellite Cell Activation
muscleRepair.description: Primary mechanism - activates dormant muscle satellite cells, which fuse to damaged muscle fibers to aid repair and regeneration.

muscleRepair.title: Delayed Senescence
muscleRepair.description: Human cell studies show MGF E-peptide increases proliferative lifespan and delays senescence in muscle progenitor cells from younger donors.

muscleRepair.title: Enhanced Fusion Potential
muscleRepair.description: Research demonstrates increased fusion potential of activated satellite cells, supporting muscle fiber repair and potential hypertrophy.

tissueRegeneration.title: Tendon Healing
tissueRegeneration.description: Animal studies suggest PEG-MGF may improve healing outcomes in tendon injuries, including Achilles tendon models.

tissueRegeneration.title: Bone Regeneration
tissueRegeneration.description: Rabbit models showed faster bone healing with PEG-MGF through regulation of osteoblast activity.

tissueRegeneration.title: Cartilage Repair
tissueRegeneration.description: Research indicates potential for articular cartilage repair in joint injury models.

recovery.title: Exercise Recovery
recovery.description: MGF is naturally upregulated following mechanical stress/exercise. Supplementation may enhance natural recovery processes.

recovery.title: Injury Recovery
recovery.description: Localized administration near injury sites may support targeted tissue repair through satellite cell recruitment.

recovery.title: Anti-Inflammatory Modulation
recovery.description: MGF overexpression studies show modulation of inflammatory cytokines and enhanced macrophage resolution during recovery.

neuroprotection.title: Oxidative Stress Protection
neuroprotection.description: Research shows MGF protects against oxygen free radical damage in neuronal tissue, suggesting antioxidant properties.

neuroprotection.title: Neuronal Repair & Adaptation
neuroprotection.description: Studies indicate MGF has special functions in damage, repair and adaptation in neuronal tissue beyond its muscle effects.

neuroprotection.title: Cell Transplantation Enhancement
neuroprotection.description: MGF-24aa-E peptide improves human precursor cell transplantation and in vivo cell migration, potentially enhancing cell-based therapies.

pinealon.subtitle: Synthetic Tripeptide | Neuroprotection & Cognitive EnhancementNasal
pinealon.descriptionEn: Pinealon (Glu-Asp-Arg/EDR) is a synthetic tripeptide bioregulator developed in Russia that demonstrates unique DNA-interaction capabilities for neuroprotection and cognitive enhancement. Research suggests benefits for traumatic brain injury recovery, age-related cognitive decline, and cellular aging processes through direct gene expression modulation.
pinealon.keyBenefits: Highest bioavailability, direct systemic delivery, established clinical protocols with proven efficacy
pinealon.mechanism: Subcutaneous injection provides optimal bioavailability and systemic distribution for neuroprotection and DNA interactionMolecular InformationWeight418.4 DaLength3 amino acidsTypeTripeptideAmino Acid Sequence:Glu-Asp-Arg (EDR)* Synthetic peptide bioregulator with direct DNA interaction capabilities
pinealon.protocolTiming: Morning injection aligns with natural circadian rhythms. Rotate injection sites.Peptide InteractionsEpitalonSynergisticCortexinSynergisticThymalinCompatibleMelatoninMonitor CombinationBPC-157CompatibleNAD+CompatibleHow to ReconstituteCalculatorImportant: Always use bacteriostatic water (BAC). Steril

interactions.name: Epitalon
interactions.description: Enhanced neuroprotection and anti-aging effects through complementary telomerase activation and DNA interaction pathways. Russian protocols combine both for comprehensive longevity support.

interactions.name: Cortexin
interactions.description: Synergistic cognitive recovery in stroke patients through complementary brain region targeting. Pinealon provides DNA-level neuroprotection while Cortexin offers tissue-level support.

interactions.name: Thymalin
interactions.description: Safe combination supporting neural-immune axis optimization. Long-term Russian protocols show 2.5-fold mortality reduction when combined with Epithalamin.

interactions.name: Melatonin
interactions.description: Monitor sleep patterns and melatonin sensitivity. Pinealon stimulates endogenous serotonin production, potentially allowing reduced exogenous melatonin doses.

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: Different mechanisms with no known interactions. BPC-157 focuses on tissue repair while Pinealon targets neurological and aging pathways.

interactions.name: NAD+
interactions.description: Complementary anti-aging mechanisms. NAD+ supports cellular energy while Pinealon provides DNA-level protection and gene expression modulation.

pinealon.descriptionKo: Pinealon(Glu-Asp-Arg/EDR)은 러시아에서 개발된 합성 삼중펩티드 생체 조절제로서 신경 보호 및 인지 향상을 위한 독특한 DNA 상호 작용 능력을 보여줍니다. 연구에 따르면 직접적인 유전자 발현 조절을 통해 외상성 뇌 손상 회복, 연령 관련 인지 저하, 세포 노화 과정에 이점이 있는 것으로 나타났습니다.
pinealon.keyBenefitsKo: 최고의 생체 이용률, 직접적인 전신 전달, 검증된 효능을 갖춘 확립된 임상 프로토콜

prostamax.subtitle: Synthetic Tetrapeptide | Prostate Bioregulator
prostamax.descriptionEn: Prostamax (Lys-Glu-Asp-Pro/KEDP) is a synthetic tetrapeptide bioregulator from the Khavinson peptide family that demonstrates prostate-specific tissue effects. Preclinical research shows anti-inflammatory and tissue-protective properties in chronic prostatitis models, with emerging interest in epigenetic chromatin regulation and anti-aging applications. Human clinical trial data remains limited.
prostamax.keyBenefits: Direct systemic delivery, optimal bioavailability for prostate tissue targeting, established preclinical protocols

interactions.name: Epitalon
interactions.description: Both are Khavinson bioregulators with complementary mechanisms. Prostamax targets prostate tissue while Epitalon focuses on telomerase activation. Russian protocols combine multiple bioregulators for comprehensive anti-aging support.

interactions.name: Thymalin
interactions.description: Safe combination supporting prostate-immune axis. Both are short Khavinson peptides with different tissue specificities. Long-term Russian studies show safety of multi-peptide bioregulator protocols.

interactions.name: Pinealon
interactions.description: Different target tissues with no known interactions. Pinealon targets neurological pathways while Prostamax focuses on prostate tissue. Can be used in comprehensive bioregulator protocols.

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: Different mechanisms with no documented interactions. BPC-157 focuses on tissue repair and GI protection while Prostamax provides prostate-specific bioregulation.

interactions.name: 5-Alpha Reductase Inhibitors
interactions.description: Both affect prostate tissue - effects may overlap or be amplified. Monitor for enhanced effects and consult healthcare provider if using together.

interactions.name: Testosterone/TRT
interactions.description: Both influence prostate tissue. Theoretical concern for combined effects on prostate growth. Monitor PSA levels and prostate symptoms if using together.

interactions.name: Saw Palmetto (Serenoa repens)
interactions.description: Preclinical studies compared Prostamax favorably to Serenoa repens extract. Different mechanisms - may provide complementary prostate support.

safetyNotes: Human clinical trial data not yet published - dosing extrapolated from preclinical models
Possible mild injection site reactions (redness, swelling)

Contraindicated when active prostate malignancy exists - theoretical concern for tumor growth stimulation
Not recommended during pregnancy or lactation
Quality sourcing critical - verify purity and avoid contaminated products
stopSigns: Persistent injection site reactions or signs of infection
Unusual urinary symptoms or prostate discomfort
Signs of allergic reaction (rash, swelling, difficulty breathing)
Severe digestive issues or persistent headache
Any concerning symptoms - consult healthcare provider immediately
prostamax.descriptionKo: Prostamax(Lys-Glu-Asp-Pro/KEDP)는 전립선 특이적 조직 효과를 입증하는 Khavinson 펩타이드 계열의 합성 테트라펩타이드 생체 조절제입니다. 전임상 연구에서는 만성 전립선염 모델에서 항염증 및 조직 보호 특성이 나타났으며, 후생유전적 염색질 조절 및 노화 방지 응용 분야에 대한 관심이 높아지고 있습니다. 인간을 대상으로 한 임상시험 데이터는 여전히 제한적입니다.
prostamax.keyBenefitsKo: 직접 전신 전달, 전립선 조직 표적화를 위한 최적의 생체 이용률, 확립된 전임상 프로토콜
prostamax.mechanismKo: 피하 주사는 전립선 세포의 조직 특이적 생체 조절을 위한 전신 순환을 제공합니다. 분자 정보무게487.5 DaLength4 아미노산유형테트라펩타이드아미노산 서열:Lys-Glu-Asp-Pro(KEDP)* 전립선 조직 특이성을 지닌 합성 Khavinson 펩타이드 생체 조절제
safetyNotesKo: 아직 공개되지 않은 인간 임상 시험 데이터 - 전임상 모델에서 추정된 투여량
경미한 주사 부위 반응(발적, 부기)이 발생할 수 있음
경미한 소화불량이나 두통이 드물게 보고됨
활동성 전립선 악성종양이 있는 경우 금기 - 종양 성장 자극에 대한 이론적 우려
임신이나 수유 중에는 권장하지 않음
품질 소싱 중요 - 순도 확인 및 오염된 제품 방지
stopSignsKo: 지속적인 주사 부위 반응 또는 감염 징후
비정상적인 배뇨 증상 또는 전립선 불편감
알레르기 반응 징후(발진, 부기, 호흡 곤란)
심각한 소화 문제 또는 지속적인 두통
우려되는 증상이 있으면 즉시 의료 서비스 제공자에게 문의하세요.

pt-141.subtitle: Melanocortin Receptor Agonist | Sexual Dysfunction TreatmentNasal
pt-141.routeDetail: InjectableSubcutaneous: abdomen (2 inches from navel) or upper thigh
pt-141.descriptionEn: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) is an FDA-approved synthetic peptide that acts as a melanocortin receptor agonist, specifically targeting MC3R and MC4R receptors in the central nervous system. Unlike traditional ED medications that work through vascular mechanisms, PT-141 directly influences sexual arousal pathways in the brain, making it effective for both male and female sexual dysfunction.
pt-141.keyBenefits: FDA-approved route with predictable absorption, works within 45 minutes, effective for both male and female sexual dysfunction
pt-141.mechanism: Activates melanocortin receptors (MC3R/MC4R) in the central nervous system, triggering sexual arousal pathways independent of vascular mechanisms
pt-141.protocolTiming: Best taken 45-60 minutes before sexual activity. Can be taken with or without food, though food may reduce nausea. Effects last 6-12 hours.Peptide InteractionsSildenafil/TadalafilMonitor CombinationMelanotan IIUse CautionBlood Pressure MedicationsMonitor CombinationAlcoholUse CautionNitratesAvoid Co

interactions.name: Sildenafil/Tadalafil
interactions.description: Can be used together but monitor for additive blood pressure effects. PT-141 works centrally while PDE5 inhibitors work peripherally.

interactions.name: Melanotan II
interactions.description: Both are melanocortin agonists - combining may lead to excessive melanocortin activation and side effects. Not recommended without medical supervision.

interactions.name: Blood Pressure Medications
interactions.description: PT-141 can transiently lower blood pressure. Monitor BP closely when combining with antihypertensives.

interactions.name: Alcohol
interactions.description: Both can lower blood pressure and cause flushing. Limit alcohol intake when using PT-141 to avoid excessive hypotension.

interactions.name: Nitrates
interactions.description: Risk of severe hypotension. Do not use PT-141 with nitrate medications for heart conditions.

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: No known interactions. Different mechanisms of action - PT-141 for sexual function, BPC-157 for tissue repair.

interactions.name: Testosterone
interactions.description: May work synergistically for sexual dysfunction. PT-141 addresses arousal while testosterone supports libido and function.

interactions.name: Kisspeptin
interactions.description: Both affect sexual function through different pathways - PT-141 via melanocortin receptors (MC3R/MC4R), Kisspeptin via GnRH stimulation. No receptor overlap but monitor for additive effects on blood pressure and hormonal response.

safetyNotes: Common side effects: nausea (40%), flushing (20%), headache (11%)
Take anti-nausea medication 30 minutes before if prone to nausea
Monitor blood pressure - can cause transient decrease
Not for use with uncontrolled hypertension or cardiovascular disease
Avoid alcohol to minimize blood pressure effects
FDA black box warning for blood pressure effects
stopSigns: Severe or persistent nausea/vomiting
Significant drop in blood pressure or dizziness
Chest pain or irregular heartbeat
Severe headache or vision changes
Prolonged erection (>4 hours) - rare but seek immediate medical attention
Severe skin darkening (rare with PT-141 vs other melanocortins)
pt-141.descriptionKo: PT-141(브레멜라노타이드)은 멜라노코르틴 수용체 작용제 역할을 하며 특히 중추신경계의 MC3R 및 MC4R 수용체를 표적으로 하는 FDA 승인 합성 펩타이드입니다. 혈관 메커니즘을 통해 작용하는 기존 발기부전 약물과 달리 PT-141은 뇌의 성적 각성 경로에 직접적으로 영향을 미쳐 남성과 여성 모두의 성기능 장애에 효과적입니다.
pt-141.keyBenefitsKo: 예측 가능한 흡수가 가능한 FDA 승인 경로로 45분 이내에 효과가 나타나며 남성과 여성 모두의 성기능 장애에 효과적입니다.
pt-141.mechanismKo: 중추신경계의 멜라노코르틴 수용체(MC3R/MC4R)를 활성화하여 혈관 메커니즘과 관계없이 성적 각성 경로를 유발합니다.
pt-141.subtitleKo: 멜라노코르틴 수용체 작용제 | 성기능 장애 치료비강
safetyNotesKo: 일반적인 부작용: 메스꺼움(40%), 홍조(20%), 두통(11%)
메스꺼움을 느끼면 30분 전에 항오심제를 복용하세요.
혈압 모니터링 - 일시적인 감소를 일으킬 수 있음
조절되지 않는 고혈압이나 심혈관 질환에는 사용하지 마십시오.
혈압 영향을 최소화하려면 알코올을 피하십시오.
혈압 영향에 대한 FDA 블랙박스 경고
stopSignsKo: 심각하거나 지속적인 메스꺼움/구토
혈압이나 현기증이 크게 감소합니다.
가슴 통증 또는 불규칙한 심장 박동
심한 두통이나 시력 변화
장기간 발기(>4시간) - 드물지만 즉시 의사의 진료를 받아야 합니다.
심한 피부 흑화(다른 멜라노코르틴에 비해 PT-141에서는 드물게 나타남)

retatrutide.subtitle: Triple GLP-1/GIP/Glucagon Agonist | Weight Loss & Diabetes
retatrutide.routeDetail: InjectableAbdomen, thigh, upper arm - rotate weekly to prevent lipodystrophy
retatrutide.descriptionEn: Retatrutide (LY3437943) is a novel triple hormone receptor agonist targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors. Phase III TRIUMPH-4 trial (Dec 2025) achieved 28.7% weight loss (71.2 lbs) at 68 weeks with 12mg dose - the highest recorded for any obesity medication. Currently in late-stage Phase III development by Eli Lilly with FDA approval expected 2026-2027.
retatrutide.keyBenefits: Triple hormone receptor activation provides superior weight loss (24.2%), improved glycemic control, and enhanced cardiovascular benefits compared to single or dual agonists
retatrutide.mechanism: Activates GLP-1 for appetite suppression, GIP for insulin sensitivity, and glucagon for increased energy expenditure and hepatic fat oxidationMolecular InformationWeight4,731.33 DaLength39 amino acidsTypeTriple GLP-1/GIP/glucagon agonistAmino Acid Sequence:His-Aib-Glu-Gly-Thr-Phe-Thr-Ser-Asp-Val-Ser-Ser-Tyr-Leu-Glu-Gly-Gln-Ala-Ala-Lys-Glu-Phe-Ile-Ala-Trp-Leu-Val-Arg-Gly-Arg-Gly-Pro-Ser-Ser-Gly-Ala
retatrutide.protocolTiming: Administer on the same day each week for consistent hormone regulation. Can be taken with or without food due to subcutaneous administration.Peptide InteractionsTirzepatideAvoid CombinationCagrilintideUse CautionSemaglutideAvoid CombinationInsulinMonitor CombinationMetforminCompatibleSGLT2 Inhibitor

interactions.name: Tirzepatide
interactions.description: Do not combine with other dual/triple agonists - risk of severe hypoglycemia, excessive gastrointestinal effects, and unpredictable hormone interactions

interactions.name: Cagrilintide
interactions.description: Both cause significant GI effects (gastroparesis, nausea). Retatrutide (triple agonist) and Cagrilintide (amylin agonist) have different mechanisms but compounded GI side effects create substantial risk. Not recommended without specialist supervision.

interactions.name: Semaglutide
interactions.description: Do not combine with other GLP-1 agonists - overlapping mechanisms increase risk of severe hypoglycemia and excessive side effects

interactions.name: Insulin
interactions.description: May significantly reduce insulin requirements due to improved glucose control - monitor blood glucose closely and adjust insulin doses accordingly

interactions.name: Metformin
interactions.description: Safe combination tested in clinical trials with no significant interactions. Both work through different mechanisms to improve glucose control and weight management

interactions.name: SGLT2 Inhibitors
interactions.description: Clinical trials included participants on SGLT2 inhibitors with no safety concerns. Complementary mechanisms for glucose control

interactions.name: Oral Contraceptives
interactions.description: Space oral contraceptives by 1 hour before retatrutide injection due to delayed gastric emptying effects

interactions.name: Warfarin
interactions.description: Weight loss may affect warfarin requirements - monitor INR more frequently and adjust anticoagulation as needed

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: Safe combination - different therapeutic targets. BPC-157 promotes tissue repair via growth factors while Retatrutide targets metabolic hormone receptors. BPC-157 may provide GI protective benefits during Retatrutide use.

interactions.name: NAD+
interactions.description: Safe combination - different cellular systems. Retatrutide targets hormone receptors (GLP-1/GIP/glucagon) while NAD+ supports cellular energy and DNA repair. NAD+ may support metabolic adaptation during weight loss.

latestResearch.title: TRIUMPH-4 Phase III: 28.7% Weight Loss in First Successful Trial
latestResearch.excerpt: Eli Lilly announces landmark Phase III results: 12mg dose achieved 71.2 lbs (28.7%) weight loss at 68 weeks with 75.8% knee pain reduction. New dysesthesia safety signal identified in 8.8-20.9% of participants. Six more Phase III trials expected to read out by end of 2026.

latestResearch.excerpt: Breakthrough cryo-EM structures reveal how Retatrutide simultaneously activates all three hormone receptors, providing molecular basis for superior clinical efficacy.

latestResearch.excerpt: Major cardiovascular outcomes trial reaches 50% enrollment milestone for 5-year study assessing cardiovascular and kidney outcomes in participants with obesity and ASCVD.

safetyNotes: Most common side effects are gastrointestinal (nausea 43%, diarrhea 33% at 12mg) - typically mild to moderate and dose-dependent
NEW SIGNAL (Dec 2025): Dysesthesia (abnormal touch sensations) reported in 8.8-20.9% of participants at 9-12mg doses in TRIUMPH-4 trial
Conservative start at 0.5mg weekly minimizes GI side effects (13% vs 73-94% at higher doses) - escalate gradually every 4 weeks
Phase III discontinuation rates: 12.2% (9mg) and 18.2% (12mg) due to adverse events - correlated with baseline BMI
Monitor for signs of pancreatitis (severe abdominal pain radiating to back) - discontinue immediately if suspected
Heart rate increases are common, especially in first 24 weeks - monitor cardiovascular status regularly
Contraindicated in patients with personal/family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma or MEN2 syndrome
May cause rapid weight loss - some discontinuations due to perceived excessive weight loss
stopSigns: Severe persistent nausea or vomiting preventing adequate nutrition or hydration
Signs of pancreatitis: severe abdominal pain radiating to back, nausea, vomiting
Symptoms of severe hypoglycemia: confusion, dizziness, sweating, rapid heartbeat
Excessive weight loss (>3 lbs per week consistently or >25% total body weight)
Signs of gallbladder problems: severe right upper abdominal pain, clay-colored stools
Persistent severe diarrhea leading to dehydration or electrolyte imbalances
retatrutide.descriptionKo: Retatrutide(LY3437943)는 GLP-1, GIP 및 글루카곤 수용체를 표적으로 하는 새로운 삼중 호르몬 수용체 작용제입니다. 3상 TRIUMPH-4 시험(2025년 12월)은 12mg 용량으로 68주차에 28.7%의 체중 감소(71.2lbs)를 달성했습니다. 이는 모든 비만 치료제에 대한 최고 기록입니다. 현재 Eli Lilly의 후기 단계 III 단계 개발이 진행 중이며 2026~2027년에 FDA 승인이 예상됩니다.
retatrutide.keyBenefitsKo: 삼중 호르몬 수용체 활성화는 단일 또는 이중 작용제에 비해 탁월한 체중 감소(24.2%), 향상된 혈당 조절 및 향상된 심혈관 혜택을 제공합니다.
retatrutide.mechanismKo: 식욕 억제를 위한 GLP-1, 인슐린 감수성을 위한 GIP, 에너지 소비 증가 및 간 지방 산화를 위한 글루카곤 활성화분자 정보무게4,731.33 DaLength39 아미노산유형삼중 GLP-1/GIP/글루카곤 작용제아미노산 순서: His-Aib-Glu-Gly-Thr-Phe-Thr-Ser-Asp-Val-Ser-Ser-Tyr-Leu-Glu-Gly-Gln-Ala-Ala-Lys-Glu-Phe-Ile-Ala-Trp-Leu-Val-Arg-Gly-Arg-Gly-Pro-Ser-Ser-Gly-Ala
retatrutide.subtitleKo: 삼중 GLP-1/GIP/글루카곤 작용제 | 체중 감소 및 당뇨병
safetyNotesKo: 가장 흔한 부작용은 위장관(12mg에서 메스꺼움 43%, 설사 33%)입니다. 일반적으로 경증에서 중등도이며 용량에 따라 다릅니다.
새로운 신호(2025년 12월): TRIUMPH-4 시험에서 9~12mg 용량의 참가자 중 8.8~20.9%에서 감각 이상(비정상적인 촉각 감각)이 보고되었습니다.
매주 0.5mg으로 보수적으로 시작하면 위장관 부작용이 최소화됩니다(고용량에서는 13% 대 73-94%). 4주마다 점진적으로 증량합니다.
3상 중단율: 부작용으로 인한 12.2%(9mg) 및 18.2%(12mg) - 베이스라인 BMI와 상관관계
췌장염(등으로 방사되는 심한 복통) 징후가 있는지 모니터링하고 의심되는 경우 즉시 중단합니다.
특히 첫 24주 동안 심박수 증가가 흔합니다. 정기적으로 심혈관 상태를 모니터링하세요.
갑상선 수질암종 또는 MEN2 증후군의 개인/가족력이 있는 환자에게는 금기입니다.
급격한 체중 감소를 일으킬 수 있음 - 과도한 체중 감소로 인해 일부 중단
stopSignsKo: 심각한 지속적인 메스꺼움이나 구토로 인해 적절한 영양이나 수분 공급이 방해됨
췌장염의 징후 : 등으로 방사되는 심한 복통, 메스꺼움, 구토
중증 저혈당 증상 : 혼돈, 현기증, 발한, 빠른 심장박동
과도한 체중 감소(지속적으로 주당 3파운드 초과 또는 총 체중의 25% 초과)
담낭 문제의 징후: 심한 오른쪽 상복부 통증, 점토색 변
탈수 또는 전해질 불균형으로 이어지는 지속적인 심한 설사

latestResearchKo.title: TRIUMPH-4 Phase III: 28.7% Weight Loss in First Successful Trial
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Eli Lilly announces landmark Phase III results: 12mg dose achieved 71.2 lbs (28.7%) weight loss at 68 weeks with 75.8% knee pain reduction. New dysesthesia safety signal identified in 8.8-20.9% of participants. Six more Phase III trials expected to read out by end of 2026.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: TRIUMPH-4 3상: 첫 번째 성공적인 시험에서 체중 28.7% 감소
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: Eli Lilly는 획기적인 3상 결과를 발표했습니다. 12mg 용량은 68주차에 71.2파운드(28.7%)의 체중 감소와 75.8%의 무릎 통증 감소를 달성했습니다. 참가자의 8.8~20.9%에서 새로운 감각이상 안전 신호가 확인되었습니다. 2026년 말까지 6개의 추가 임상 3상 결과가 나올 것으로 예상됩니다.

latestResearchKo.excerpt: Breakthrough cryo-EM structures reveal how Retatrutide simultaneously activates all three hormone receptors, providing molecular basis for superior clinical efficacy.

selank.subtitle: Synthetic Tuftsin Analog | Anxiolytic & Nootropic PeptideNasal
selank.routeDetail: InjectableAbdomen, thigh, or upper arm subcutaneously
selank.descriptionEn: Selank is a synthetic heptapeptide analog of the naturally occurring immune peptide tuftsin, developed by the Russian Academy of Sciences. This anxiolytic and nootropic peptide has been extensively studied for its ability to reduce anxiety, enhance cognitive function, and modulate immune responses without the side effects associated with traditional benzodiazepines. Selank works through complex interactions with GABAergic, serotonergic, and dopaminergic neurotransmitter systems, offering a unique mechanism for stress reduction and cognitive enhancement.
selank.keyBenefits: Rapid onset anxiolytic effects, enhanced BDNF expression, improved stress resilience, cognitive enhancement, immune modulation, no tolerance or withdrawal, neuroprotective effects
selank.mechanism: Allosteric modulation of GABA-A receptors, serotonin and dopamine system optimization, enkephalin degradation inhibition, IL-6 and cytokine balance regulation, BDNF upregulation in hippocampusMolecular InformationWeight751.89 DaLength7 amino acidsTypeTuftsin analogAmino Acid Sequence:Thr-Lys-Pro-Arg-Pro-Gly-Pro* Synthetic analog of tuftsin with anxiolytic properties
selank.protocolTiming: Selank can be injected any time of day. Morning injection may provide better cognitive benefits, while evening injection may enhance relaxation and sleep quality.Peptide InteractionsSemaxSynergisticBPC-157CompatibleNoopeptCompatiblePhenylpiracetamCompatibleBenzodiazepinesUse CautionSSRI Antidepressa

selank.descriptionKo: Selank는 러시아 과학 아카데미에서 개발한 자연 발생 면역 펩타이드 터프신의 합성 헵타펩타이드 유사체입니다. 이 항불안제 및 방향성 펩타이드는 전통적인 벤조디아제핀과 관련된 부작용 없이 불안을 줄이고, 인지 기능을 향상시키며, 면역 반응을 조절하는 능력에 대해 광범위하게 연구되었습니다. Selank는 GABA성, 세로토닌성 및 도파민성 신경 전달 물질 시스템과의 복잡한 상호 작용을 통해 작동하여 스트레스 감소 및 인지 향상을 위한 독특한 메커니즘을 제공합니다.
selank.keyBenefitsKo: 급속 발현 항불안 효과, BDNF 발현 강화, 스트레스 회복력 향상, 인지 강화, 면역 조절, 무내약성, 금단 증상, 신경 보호 효과
selank.mechanismKo: GABA-A 수용체의 알로스테릭 조절, 세로토닌 및 도파민 시스템 최적화, 엔케팔린 분해 억제, IL-6 및 사이토카인 균형 조절, 해마의 BDNF 상향조절분자 정보무게751.89 DaLength7 아미노산유형Tuftsin 유사체아미노산 서열:Thr-Lys-Pro-Arg-Pro-Gly-Pro* Tuftsin의 합성 유사체 항불안제 특성
selank.subtitleKo: 합성 터프트신 아날로그 | 불안 완화 및 누트로픽 펩타이드비강
safetyNotesKo: 개별 반응을 평가하려면 최저 유효 용량(250mcg)부터 시작하세요.
Selank는 보고된 부작용이 최소화된 탁월한 안전성 프로필을 보유하고 있습니다.
알려진 내성, 의존성 또는 금단 문제는 보고되지 않았습니다.
의료 감독 하에 대부분의 약물과 안전하게 병용 가능
펩타이드 안정성과 효능을 유지하려면 적절하게 냉장 보관하세요.
감염을 예방하기 위해 멸균 주사 기술을 사용하십시오.
여러 정신과 약물을 복용하는 경우 의료 서비스 제공자와 상담하세요.
stopSignsKo: 심한 알레르기 반응(발진, 호흡곤란, 부기)
지속적인 주사 부위 반응 또는 감염 징후
비정상적인 기분 변화 또는 불안감 증가(드물게)
심한 두통이나 신경학적 증상
제품에 오염된 흔적이 있는 경우(특이한 냄새, 탁함)
설명할 수 없는 피로 또는 인지 장애
피부 반응 또는 면역 체계 과민증

semaglutide.subtitle: GLP-1 Receptor Agonist | Weight Loss & Diabetes
semaglutide.routeDetail: InjectableAbdomen, thigh, or upper arm (rotate weekly)
semaglutide.descriptionEn: Semaglutide is a long-acting glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist FDA-approved for type 2 diabetes management (as Ozempic) and chronic weight management (as Wegovy). With over 17,000 participants in clinical trials, it demonstrates significant weight loss potential (average 15-20% body weight reduction) through appetite suppression, slowed gastric emptying, and enhanced glucose control.
semaglutide.keyBenefits: FDA-approved treatment with established efficacy for weight loss (15-20% average) and diabetes management. Convenient once-weekly dosing with proven cardiovascular benefits and comprehensive safety data from extensive clinical trials.
semaglutide.mechanism: Subcutaneous semaglutide mimics native GLP-1, binding to GLP-1 receptors to stimulate glucose-dependent insulin secretion, suppress glucagon, slow gastric emptying, and reduce appetite through hypothalamic pathways. The 7-day half-life allows weekly dosing.Molecular InformationWeight4,113.64 DaLength31 amino acidsTypeGLP-1 receptor agonistAmino Acid Sequence:His-Aib-Glu-Gly-Thr-Phe-Thr-Ser-Asp-Val
semaglutide.protocolTiming: Inject on the same day each week at any time. If you miss a dose and it's within 5 days, take it as soon as remembered. If more than 5 days, skip and resume regular schedule.Peptide InteractionsInsulinMonitor CombinationTirzepatideAvoid CombinationCagrilintideSynergisticMetforminCompatibleGrowth Hor

interactions.name: Insulin

interactions.name: Tirzepatide

interactions.name: Cagrilintide
interactions.description: Combined as CagriSema in clinical trials - amylin analog (cagrilintide) + GLP-1 agonist (semaglutide) for enhanced weight loss

interactions.name: Metformin
interactions.description: Commonly used together for diabetes management; complementary mechanisms with good safety profile

interactions.name: Growth Hormone Peptides
interactions.description: No known interactions; different mechanisms of action and receptor targets

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: No contraindications; BPC-157 may help with GI side effects if they occur

interactions.name: Sulfonylureas
interactions.description: Increased hypoglycemia risk; may require sulfonylurea dose reduction when initiating semaglutide

interactions.name: Oral Medications
interactions.description: Delayed gastric emptying may affect absorption of oral medications; consider timing adjustments

weightLoss.title: Clinically Significant Weight Reduction
weightLoss.description: FDA-approved for chronic weight management with average 15-20% body weight loss in clinical trials

weightLoss.title: Appetite and Craving Control

weightLoss.title: First Oral GLP-1 for Weight Management
weightLoss.description: Oral Wegovy (25mg) is the first oral GLP-1 receptor agonist FDA-approved for chronic weight management, offering a needle-free alternative to injectable Wegovy

weightLoss.title: Clinically Significant Weight Loss
weightLoss.description: In the 64-week OASIS 4 trial, adults on oral Wegovy lost ~14% of body weight (~33 lb from 235 lb avg) vs 2.4% with placebo. 76% achieved ≥5% loss, 60% achieved ≥10%, and about 1 in 4 lost ≥20% (~47 lb or more)

weightLoss.title: Comparable to Injectable Efficacy
weightLoss.description: Oral Wegovy 25mg achieves weight loss approaching injectable Wegovy 2.4mg, providing a meaningful needle-free option for patients

diabetes.title: Beta Cell Preservation
diabetes.description: Improves insulin secretion and may help preserve pancreatic beta cell function

latestResearch.excerpt: Phase 3 trial testing 7.2mg weekly dose achieves unprecedented 20.7% weight loss at 72 weeks, potentially expanding therapeutic options.

latestResearch.excerpt: CagriSema (cagrilintide + semaglutide) phase 2 results show 25% weight loss, surpassing monotherapy outcomes.

latestResearch.excerpt: First oral GLP-1 receptor agonist approved for chronic weight management. The 25mg daily tablet demonstrated 13.6% weight loss in the OASIS 4 trial, offering a needle-free alternative to injectable Wegovy.

safetyNotes: FDA-approved medication with extensive safety data from trials of 17,000+ participants
Start low and titrate slowly to minimize GI side effects
Most common side effects: nausea, diarrhea, vomiting, constipation, stomach pain, headache, fatigue, dizziness, bloating, belching, gas, heartburn, and upset stomach
Hair loss and changes in skin sensations have been reported
Contraindicated in personal or family history of medullary thyroid carcinoma (MTC) or Multiple Endocrine Neoplasia syndrome type 2 (MEN 2)
May cause thyroid tumors including cancer — tell your provider about neck lumps, hoarseness, trouble swallowing, or shortness of breath
May cause gallbladder problems including gallstones — some may require surgery
Can increase heart rate at rest — tell your provider if you feel your heart racing or pounding for several minutes
Increased risk of low blood sugar (hypoglycemia) when combined with insulin or sulfonylureas
Dehydration from GI side effects may lead to kidney problems — stay well hydrated
Tell all healthcare providers you take Wegovy before any surgery or procedure using anesthesia due to aspiration risk
Stop use 2 months before a planned pregnancy — may harm an unborn baby
Not recommended during pregnancy or breastfeeding
stopSigns: Severe persistent abdominal pain with or without vomiting (possible pancreatitis)
Gallbladder symptoms: upper abdominal pain, fever, yellowing of skin/eyes, clay-colored stools
Signs of thyroid tumor: neck lump or swelling, hoarseness, trouble swallowing, shortness of breath
Serious allergic reaction: swelling of face/lips/tongue/throat, difficulty breathing, severe rash, fainting, rapid heartbeat
Persistent vomiting or diarrhea causing dehydration (decreased urination, dark urine, dizziness)
Vision changes (possible diabetic retinopathy worsening in type 2 diabetes patients)
Severe hypoglycemia symptoms: confusion, shakiness, blurred vision, slurred speech, loss of consciousness
Signs of kidney problems: decreased urination, swelling in legs/feet
semaglutide.descriptionKo: 세마글루티드는 제2형 당뇨병 관리(Ozempic) 및 만성 체중 관리(Wegovy)에 대해 FDA 승인을 받은 지속성 글루카곤 유사 펩타이드-1(GLP-1) 수용체 작용제입니다. 임상 시험에 17,000명 이상의 참가자가 참여한 이 제품은 식욕 억제, 위 배출 속도 저하, 혈당 조절 강화를 통해 상당한 체중 감소 가능성(평균 15-20% 체중 감소)을 보여줍니다.
semaglutide.keyBenefitsKo: 체중 감소(평균 15~20%) 및 당뇨병 관리에 대한 효능이 입증된 FDA 승인 치료법입니다. 광범위한 임상 시험을 통해 입증된 심혈관 혜택과 포괄적인 안전성 데이터를 바탕으로 편리한 주 1회 투여가 가능합니다.
semaglutide.mechanismKo: 피하 세마글루티드는 천연 GLP-1을 모방하여 GLP-1 수용체에 결합하여 포도당 의존성 인슐린 분비를 자극하고 글루카곤을 억제하며 위 배출을 늦추고 시상하부 경로를 통해 식욕을 감소시킵니다. 반감기는 7일이므로 매주 투여할 수 있습니다. 분자 정보무게4,113.64 DaLength31 아미노산유형GLP-1 수용체 작용제아미노산 서열:His-Aib-Glu-Gly-Thr-Phe-Thr-Ser-Asp-Val
semaglutide.subtitleKo: GLP-1 수용체 작용제 | 체중 감소 및 당뇨병
safetyNotesKo: 17,000명 이상의 참가자를 대상으로 한 임상시험에서 얻은 광범위한 안전성 데이터를 갖춘 FDA 승인 약물
GI 부작용을 최소화하려면 낮게 시작하고 천천히 적정하세요.
가장 흔한 부작용: 메스꺼움, 설사, 구토, 변비, 복통, 두통, 피로, 현기증, 팽만감, 트림, 가스, 가슴쓰림, 배탈
탈모 및 피부 감각의 변화가 보고되었습니다.
갑상선 수질암(MTC) 또는 다발성 내분비 종양 증후군 2형(MEN 2)의 개인 또는 가족력이 있는 경우 금기
암을 포함한 갑상선 종양을 유발할 수 있습니다. 목 덩어리, 쉰 목소리, 삼키기 어려움 또는 호흡 곤란에 대해 의료 서비스 제공자에게 알리십시오.
담석을 포함한 담낭 문제를 일으킬 수 있습니다. 일부는 수술이 필요할 수도 있습니다.
휴식 시 심박수를 높일 수 있습니다. 몇 분 동안 심장이 뛰거나 쿵쾅거리는 느낌이 들면 의료 제공자에게 알리십시오.
인슐린 또는 설포닐우레아와 병용 시 저혈당(저혈당증) 위험 증가
위장관 부작용으로 인한 탈수는 신장 문제로 이어질 수 있습니다. 충분한 수분을 유지하세요
흡인 위험으로 인해 마취를 사용하는 수술이나 시술 전에 Wegovy를 복용하는 모든 의료 서비스 제공자에게 알리십시오.
임신 예정일 2개월 전에 사용을 중단하세요. 태아에게 해를 끼칠 수 있습니다.
임신이나 모유 수유 중에는 권장하지 않음
stopSignsKo: 구토를 동반하거나 동반하지 않는 심한 지속성 복통(췌장염 가능성)
담낭 증상 : 상복부 통증, 발열, 피부/눈의 황변, 점토색 변
갑상선 종양의 징후: 목 덩어리 또는 부기, 쉰 목소리, 삼키기 어려움, 숨가쁨
심각한 알레르기 반응: 얼굴/입술/혀/목의 붓기, 호흡곤란, 심한 발진, 실신, 빠른 심장박동
탈수를 유발하는 지속적인 구토 또는 설사(배뇨 감소, 진한 소변, 현기증)
시력 변화(제2형 당뇨병 환자에서 당뇨병성 망막병증이 악화될 수 있음)
심각한 저혈당 증상: 혼돈, 떨림, 시야 흐림, 어눌한 발음, 의식 상실
신장 문제의 징후: 배뇨 감소, 다리/발 부기

latestResearchKo.title: STEP UP Trial: Higher Dose Efficacy
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Phase 3 trial testing 7.2mg weekly dose achieves unprecedented 20.7% weight loss at 72 weeks, potentially expanding therapeutic options.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: STEP UP 시험: 더 높은 용량 효능
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 7.2mg의 주당 용량을 테스트하는 3상 시험은 72주차에 전례 없는 20.7%의 체중 감소를 달성하여 잠재적으로 치료 옵션을 확장합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Real-World Evidence: 5-Year Safety Data
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Large database analysis of 175,000 patients confirms long-term safety profile with no new safety signals identified.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 실제 증거: 5년간의 안전성 데이터
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 175,000명의 환자에 대한 대규모 데이터베이스 분석을 통해 새로운 안전성 신호가 확인되지 않은 채 장기적인 안전성 프로필이 확인되었습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Combination Therapy Advances
latestResearchKo.excerpt: CagriSema (cagrilintide + semaglutide) phase 2 results show 25% weight loss, surpassing monotherapy outcomes.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 병용 요법의 발전
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 카그리세마(카그릴린타이드+세마글루타이드) 임상 2상 결과, 단독요법 결과를 능가하는 25%의 체중 감소 효과를 보였다.

latestResearchKo.title: Mechanisms Beyond Weight Loss
latestResearchKo.excerpt: New research reveals anti-inflammatory effects and improvements in NASH independent of weight loss.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 체중 감량 이상의 메커니즘
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 새로운 연구에서는 체중 감소와 관계없이 NASH의 항염증 효과와 개선이 밝혀졌습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: FDA Approves Oral Wegovy for Weight Management
latestResearchKo.excerpt: First oral GLP-1 receptor agonist approved for chronic weight management. The 25mg daily tablet demonstrated 13.6% weight loss in the OASIS 4 trial, offering a needle-free alternative to injectable Wegovy.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: FDA, 체중 관리를 위해 경구용 Wegovy 승인
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 만성 체중 관리용으로 승인된 최초의 경구용 GLP-1 수용체 작용제. 25mg 일일 정제는 OASIS 4 시험에서 13.6%의 체중 감소를 보여 주사용 Wegovy에 대한 바늘 없는 대안을 제공했습니다.

weightLoss.title: Clinically Significant Weight Reduction
weightLoss.description: FDA-approved for chronic weight management with average 15-20% body weight loss in clinical trials

weightLoss.title: Appetite and Craving Control
weightLoss.description: Reduces hunger and food cravings through central nervous system GLP-1 receptor activation

weightLoss.title: Sustained Weight Maintenance
weightLoss.description: Long-term studies show maintained weight loss with continued treatment over 2+ years

weightLoss.title: First Oral GLP-1 for Weight Management
weightLoss.description: Oral Wegovy (25mg) is the first oral GLP-1 receptor agonist FDA-approved for chronic weight management, offering a needle-free alternative to injectable Wegovy

weightLoss.title: Clinically Significant Weight Loss
weightLoss.description: In the 64-week OASIS 4 trial, adults on oral Wegovy lost ~14% of body weight (~33 lb from 235 lb avg) vs 2.4% with placebo. 76% achieved ≥5% loss, 60% achieved ≥10%, and about 1 in 4 lost ≥20% (~47 lb or more)

weightLoss.title: Comparable to Injectable Efficacy
weightLoss.description: Oral Wegovy 25mg achieves weight loss approaching injectable Wegovy 2.4mg, providing a meaningful needle-free option for patients

diabetes.title: Glycemic Control
diabetes.description: FDA-approved for type 2 diabetes with HbA1c reductions of 1.5-2% in clinical trials

diabetes.title: Cardiovascular Protection
diabetes.description: Proven 26% reduction in cardiovascular death, MI, or stroke in high-risk diabetes patients

diabetes.title: Beta Cell Preservation
diabetes.description: Improves insulin secretion and may help preserve pancreatic beta cell function

diabetes.title: Type 2 Diabetes Management
diabetes.description: FDA-approved as Rybelsus for glycemic control with HbA1c reductions of 1.0-1.4% in PIONEER clinical trials

diabetes.title: First Oral GLP-1 for Diabetes
diabetes.description: Rybelsus was the breakthrough oral GLP-1 formulation for patients unable or unwilling to use injections

diabetes.title: Cardiovascular Safety
diabetes.description: PIONEER 6 trial confirmed cardiovascular safety in high-risk diabetes patients

metabolic.title: Metabolic Syndrome Improvement
metabolic.description: Addresses multiple components: weight, glucose, blood pressure, and lipids

metabolic.title: NASH/Fatty Liver
metabolic.description: Emerging evidence for improvements in non-alcoholic fatty liver disease

metabolic.title: Inflammation Reduction
metabolic.description: Decreases systemic inflammation markers independent of weight loss

metabolic.title: Weight Loss Across Indications
metabolic.description: Rybelsus provides modest 3-5kg weight loss in diabetes trials; oral Wegovy achieves significantly greater reductions for weight management

metabolic.title: Improved Insulin Sensitivity
metabolic.description: Enhances glucose-dependent insulin secretion and reduces hepatic glucose output

metabolic.title: Lipid Profile Benefits
metabolic.description: Modest improvements in triglycerides and LDL cholesterol

compliance.title: Needle-Free Option
compliance.description: Improves treatment adherence for needle-phobic patients across both diabetes and weight management

compliance.title: Daily Routine Integration
compliance.description: Once-daily dosing may suit some patients better than weekly injections

compliance.title: Travel Convenience
compliance.description: No refrigeration or injection supplies needed

semax.subtitle: Synthetic ACTH Analog | Cognitive Enhancement PeptideNasal
semax.descriptionEn: Semax is a synthetic heptapeptide derived from adrenocorticotropic hormone (ACTH) fragment 4-10, extensively studied for its nootropic, neuroprotective, and neurorestorative properties. Originally developed in Russia for stroke recovery, this brain-targeted peptide rapidly increases BDNF levels and modulates dopaminergic and serotonergic systems to enhance cognitive function, memory, and focus.
semax.keyBenefits: Rapid brain delivery, extensive clinical research, easy self-administration, excellent bioavailability to brain regions
semax.mechanism: Direct transport through olfactory epithelium and trigeminal nerves, bypassing blood-brain barrier for enhanced CNS penetration
semax.protocolTiming: Morning administration optimizes cognitive benefits throughout the day while avoiding evening alertness that could impact sleepPeptide InteractionsNA-Semax-AmidateUse CautionSelankSynergisticBPC-157CompatibleTB-500CompatibleStimulantsMonitor CombinationMAO-InhibitorsUse CautionHow to ReconstituteCal

interactions.name: NA-Semax-Amidate
interactions.description: Enhanced version of same peptide - do NOT use simultaneously. Choose one or the other based on desired duration and potency

interactions.name: Selank
interactions.description: Complementary anxiolytic effects while Semax provides cognitive enhancement

interactions.name: BPC-157
interactions.description: No known negative interactions, both support neuroplasticity through different mechanisms

interactions.name: TB-500
interactions.description: Both support brain health and recovery, can be used together for comprehensive neuroprotection

interactions.name: Stimulants
interactions.description: May enhance effects of stimulants - monitor carefully and reduce stimulant doses when combining

interactions.name: MAO-Inhibitors
interactions.description: Theoretical risk due to monoamine system effects - consult healthcare provider before combining

Sterile packagingSealed nasal spray bottles or ampoules with sterility assurance!Nasal irritation po

3: Enhanced memory consolidation and learning capacity, stable mood effectsWeek 4: Peak cognitive benefits with improved stress resilience and mental flexibilityPost

7 days, some benefits may persist

quickStart.effectsTimeline: Onset 15-30 minutes, peak 1-2 hours, duration 4-6 hours
quickStart.storageNote: Refrigerate at 2-8°C, do not freeze, protect from light
quickStart.breakBetween: 1-2 weeks break between cycles to maintain effectiveness

latestResearch.title: Anti-Amyloid Properties in Alzheimer's Models
latestResearch.excerpt: Semax demonstrated ability to inhibit amyloid-beta aggregation and prevent copper-induced toxicity in neuroblastoma cells, suggesting potential for neurodegenerative disease treatment.

latestResearch.title: BDNF Enhancement and Neuroplasticity
latestResearch.excerpt: Research confirms Semax rapidly elevates brain-derived neurotrophic factor levels and TrkB receptor expression in hippocampus, supporting neurogenesis and synaptic plasticity.

latestResearch.title: Melanocortin Receptor Mechanisms
latestResearch.excerpt: Studies indicate Semax may act as partial agonist at MC4 and MC5 receptors while also inhibiting enkephalin-degrading enzymes, revealing multiple pathways for cognitive effects.

latestResearch.title: Comparative Bioavailability Study
latestResearch.excerpt: Intranasal administration achieves 0.093% blood-brain barrier penetration versus 0.01% with intravenous route, confirming superior nasal delivery for brain-targeted effects.

safetyNotes: Start with lowest effective dose (300mcg) to assess individual response
Avoid concurrent use with other intranasal medications that cause vasoconstriction
Monitor for any signs of nasal irritation, bleeding, or persistent discomfort
Do not exceed 4-week continuous use periods without medical supervision
Potential to enhance effects of stimulants - reduce other stimulant doses accordingly
stopSigns: Severe nasal irritation, bleeding, or persistent congestion
Unusual anxiety, agitation, or sleep disturbances
Headaches that worsen with continued use
Any signs of allergic reaction (rash, difficulty breathing)
Significant blood pressure changes or heart palpitations
semax.descriptionKo: Semax는 부신피질 자극 호르몬(ACTH) 단편 4-10에서 추출한 합성 헵타펩타이드로, 누트로픽, 신경 보호 및 신경 회복 특성에 대해 광범위하게 연구되었습니다. 원래 뇌졸중 회복을 위해 러시아에서 개발된 이 뇌 표적 펩타이드는 BDNF 수준을 빠르게 증가시키고 도파민 및 세로토닌 시스템을 조절하여 인지 기능, 기억력 및 집중력을 향상시킵니다.
semax.keyBenefitsKo: 신속한 뇌 전달, 광범위한 임상 연구, 손쉬운 자가 투여, 뇌 영역에 대한 탁월한 생체 이용률
semax.mechanismKo: 중추신경계 침투 강화를 위해 혈액뇌관문을 우회하여 후각상피와 삼차신경을 통한 직접적인 전달
semax.subtitleKo: 합성 ACTH 아날로그 | 인지 강화 펩타이드Nasal
safetyNotesKo: 개별 반응을 평가하려면 가장 낮은 유효 용량(300mcg)부터 시작하세요.
혈관 수축을 유발하는 다른 비강 내 약물과의 동시 사용을 피하십시오
코 자극, 출혈 또는 지속적인 불편함의 징후가 있는지 모니터링하십시오.
의료 감독 없이 4주 연속 사용 기간을 초과하지 마십시오.
각성제의 효과를 강화할 가능성 - 그에 따라 다른 각성제 복용량을 줄입니다.
stopSignsKo: 심한 코 자극, 출혈 또는 지속적인 코막힘
비정상적인 불안, 동요 또는 수면 장애
계속 사용하면 악화되는 두통
알레르기 반응 징후(발진, 호흡 곤란)
상당한 혈압 변화 또는 심장 두근거림

latestResearchKo.title: Anti-Amyloid Properties in Alzheimer's Models
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Semax demonstrated ability to inhibit amyloid-beta aggregation and prevent copper-induced toxicity in neuroblastoma cells, suggesting potential for neurodegenerative disease treatment.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 알츠하이머 모델의 항아밀로이드 특성
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: Semax는 아밀로이드-베타 응집을 억제하고 신경모세포종 세포에서 구리로 인한 독성을 예방하는 능력을 입증하여 신경퇴행성 질환 치료의 가능성을 제시했습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: BDNF Enhancement and Neuroplasticity
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Research confirms Semax rapidly elevates brain-derived neurotrophic factor levels and TrkB receptor expression in hippocampus, supporting neurogenesis and synaptic plasticity.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: BDNF 강화 및 신경가소성
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구에 따르면 Semax는 해마에서 뇌 유래 신경 영양 인자 수준과 TrkB 수용체 발현을 빠르게 증가시켜 신경 발생과 시냅스 가소성을 지원합니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Melanocortin Receptor Mechanisms
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Studies indicate Semax may act as partial agonist at MC4 and MC5 receptors while also inhibiting enkephalin-degrading enzymes, revealing multiple pathways for cognitive effects.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 멜라노코르틴 수용체 메커니즘
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 연구에 따르면 Semax는 MC4 및 MC5 수용체에서 부분 작용제로 작용하는 동시에 엔케팔린 분해 효소를 억제하여 인지 효과에 대한 여러 경로를 밝힐 수 있습니다.

latestResearchKo.title: Comparative Bioavailability Study
latestResearchKo.excerpt: Intranasal administration achieves 0.093% blood-brain barrier penetration versus 0.01% with intravenous route, confirming superior nasal delivery for brain-targeted effects.
latestResearchKo.titleKo: 비교 생체 이용률 연구
latestResearchKo.excerptKo: 비강 내 투여는 정맥 내 투여 시 0.01%에 비해 0.093%의 혈액뇌장벽 투과율을 달성하여 뇌 표적 효과에 대한 우수한 비강 전달을 확인합니다.

sermorelin.subtitle: GHRH 1-29 Analog | Growth Hormone Releasing HormoneNasal
sermorelin.descriptionEn: Sermorelin acetate is a 29-amino acid synthetic analog of human growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) originally FDA-approved in 1997 for pediatric growth hormone deficiency. Despite discontinuation in 2008 for manufacturing reasons, it maintains excellent safety profile and stimulates natural growth hormone production while preserving physiological pulsatile patterns.
sermorelin.keyBenefits: FDA-proven efficacy, 6% bioavailability, maintains natural GH pulses, preserves pituitary function
sermorelin.mechanism: Subcutaneous injection provides optimal bioavailability with rapid onset (5-20 minutes) and physiological pulsatile GH stimulation
sermorelin.protocolTiming: Bedtime administration aligns with natural nocturnal GH pulses. Avoid food 2+ hours before injection as carbohydrates blunt GH response. Morning administration less effective.Peptide InteractionsIpamorelinSynergisticCJC-1295SynergisticGHRP-2SynergisticOctreotideAvoid CombinationLanreotideAvoid Combi

interactions.name: Ipamorelin
interactions.description: Excellent combination producing 3-5 fold increases in GH release. GHRH and GHRP work through different pathways with proven synergistic effects in clinical studies.

interactions.name: CJC-1295
interactions.description: Highly effective combination - CJC-1295 provides sustained 6-8 day release while sermorelin offers immediate pulsatile effects. Commonly dosed together in clinical protocols.

interactions.name: GHRP-2
interactions.description: Combined GHRH+GHRP-2 produces 54-fold GH increases compared to 20-fold with GHRH alone. Well-documented synergistic mechanism.

interactions.name: Octreotide
interactions.description: Somatostatin analogs directly block GH release by activating inhibitory somatostatin receptors, completely negating sermorelin therapeutic effects.

interactions.name: Lanreotide
interactions.description: Another somatostatin analog that inhibits GH release through direct receptor antagonism, making combination with sermorelin counterproductive.

interactions.name: Prednisone
interactions.description: High-dose glucocorticoids suppress pituitary GH release and reduce GHRH receptor sensitivity. Requires dose adjustments and IGF-1 monitoring.

interactions.name: Insulin
interactions.description: GH antagonizes insulin action through IGF-1-mediated effects. Monitor blood glucose and consider insulin dose adjustments during sermorelin therapy.

interactions.name: Thyroid Hormones
interactions.description: Essential combination as untreated hypothyroidism prevents sermorelin response. 6.5% of patients develop hypothyroidism requiring hormone replacement.

sermorelin.descriptionKo: 세르모렐린 아세테이트는 인간 성장 호르몬 방출 호르몬(GHRH)의 29개 아미노산 합성 유사체로 원래 1997년 소아 성장 호르몬 결핍증에 대해 FDA 승인을 받았습니다. 2008년 제조상의 이유로 생산이 중단되었음에도 불구하고 우수한 안전성을 유지하고 생리학적 박동 패턴을 유지하면서 자연적인 성장 호르몬 생산을 자극합니다.
sermorelin.keyBenefitsKo: FDA에서 입증된 효능, 생체 이용률 6%, 천연 GH 펄스 유지, 뇌하수체 기능 보존
sermorelin.mechanismKo: 피하 주사는 빠른 개시(5~20분) 및 생리학적 박동성 GH 자극으로 최적의 생체 이용률을 제공합니다.
sermorelin.subtitleKo: GHRH 1-29 아날로그 | 성장 호르몬 방출 호르몬비강
safetyNotesKo: 갑상선 기능 모니터링 - 6.5%에서 호르몬 대체가 필요한 갑상선 기능 저하증 발생
처음에는 매월 IGF-1 수준을 확인하고, 장기적으로는 3~6개월마다 확인합니다.
주사 부위 반응은 환자의 16.7%에서 발생하지만 일반적으로 경미합니다.
활동성 악성종양, 뇌하수체 종양, 임신에 금기

slu-pp-332.subtitle: Synthetic Pan-ERR Agonist | Exercise Mimetic & Metabolic Modulator
slu-pp-332.routeDetail: InjectableResearch compound - IP injection in animals only
slu-pp-332.descriptionEn: SLU-PP-332 is a groundbreaking synthetic small-molecule compound developed at Saint Louis University that functions as a pan-estrogen-related receptor (ERR) agonist with preferential activity at ERRα. Often called an 'exercise mimetic,' it activates metabolic pathways typically engaged during physical exercise without requiring actual physical activity. By enhancing mitochondrial biogenesis, fatty acid oxidation, and energy expenditure, SLU-PP-332 has demonstrated remarkable effects across multi
slu-pp-332.keyBenefits: Exercise mimetic effects without physical activity, significant weight loss (12% in 28 days), 70% increased endurance, 25% enhanced fatty acid oxidation, improved insulin sensitivity, reduced hepatic steatosis, cardiac protection, reversal of age-related mitochondrial dysfunction, enhanced muscle oxidative capacity
slu-pp-332.mechanism: Binds to and activates estrogen-related receptors (ERRα, ERRβ, ERRγ) which regulate gene expression for energy metabolism. Upregulates PGC-1α (master regulator of mitochondrial biogenesis), activates AMPK pathway (cellular energy switch), increases mitochondrial density up to 1.8-fold, enhances oxidative phosphorylation and ATP production, promotes fatty acid oxidation, induces type IIa oxidative
slu-pp-332.protocolTiming: Animal studies used IP injection twice daily. Human administration protocols DO NOT EXIST. Researchers are developing oral pill formulation for potential future human use pending clinical trials.Peptide InteractionsMetforminMonitor CombinationInsulinMonitor CombinationTirzepatideMonitor CombinationS

interactions.name: Metformin
interactions.description: Both affect mitochondrial function and AMPK pathways - combination may have additive metabolic effects. Monitor blood glucose closely as combined use could increase hypoglycemia risk.

interactions.name: Insulin
interactions.description: SLU-PP-332 enhances insulin sensitivity and glucose metabolism - may require significant insulin dose reduction to prevent hypoglycemia. Close monitoring essential.

interactions.name: Tirzepatide
interactions.description: Both compounds affect weight loss and metabolic parameters through different mechanisms - combination could have additive effects on weight loss and glucose control. Monitor for excessive metabolic changes.

interactions.name: Semaglutide
interactions.description: Combining two weight loss mechanisms (GLP-1 + ERR agonism) may produce enhanced metabolic effects. Monitor weight loss rate and metabolic parameters closely.

interactions.name: 5-Amino-1MQ
interactions.description: Distinct mechanisms (ERR agonism vs NNMT inhibition) may be complementary for metabolic optimization without known interactions.

interactions.name: NAD+
interactions.description: Both enhance mitochondrial function through complementary pathways - SLU-PP-332 increases mitochondrial biogenesis while NAD+ supports mitochondrial energy production.

interactions.name: CJC-1295
interactions.description: Growth hormone optimization (CJC-1295) may complement metabolic enhancement (SLU-PP-332) for body composition improvements without known interactions.

interactions.name: Ipamorelin
interactions.description: May help preserve lean muscle mass during SLU-PP-332-induced fat loss through GH pathway. No known negative interactions.

quickStart.effectsTimeline: Human timeline unknown - animal studies show effects within hours to weeks
quickStart.storageNote: Research compound storage requirements vary
